programme.title: The Haunted
programme.desc: Family members are horrified when they witness their dog being flung across the room by an unseen entity. Meanwhile, on a nearby farm all the animals are dying. Investigators contemplate whether the cases are related

programme.title: Crikey! Its the Irwins
programme.desc: Robert gets set to swim with Gloria, a huge reticulated python, for the first time in the Crocoseum. Bindi welcomes home two orphaned kangaroo joeys

programme.title: Richard E Grants Seven Deadly Sins
programme.desc: Actor Richard E Grant explores the origins of the seven cardinal sins, examining the dramatic effect they have. He continues with the evolutionary roots of gluttony - eating too much, too quickly, or too wildly - investigating if it exists in the natural world

programme.desc: Pete builds a window-walled art studio and a bohemian clubhouse for 13-year-old singer Grace VanderWaal

programme.title: Crikey! Its the Irwins
programme.desc: Its the middle of summer and the reptiles at Australia Zoo are active and hungry, especially the 44 alligators who inhabit an entire lagoon. Robert has the job of feeding them all at once

programme.title: Lone Star Law
programme.desc: When a drunken man wreaks havoc on a lake, the wardens must deal with the aftermath. Warden Mike Boone tracks down the culprits responsible for an illegal dumpsite

programme.title: Dr Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: A dog with a shattered leg and seven bad-tempered chickens arrive at the clinic. The team unites when a tiny kitten is found unconscious at a construction site

programme.title: Dr Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet
programme.desc: Dr Nichols treats a cat injured in a fight with the dog next door, while a class of fourth-graders counts on Dr Jeff to save its pet hedgehog

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.sub-title: Home Is Where the Dog Is
programme.desc: One of Earls favourite senior dogs has a chance at finding a forever home. Tia heads to a shelter in Louisiana to help with a hound they have taken in

programme.title: Pit Bulls and Parolees
programme.desc: Tania and Maria create a retirement centre for senior dogs at one of the warehouses. Lizzy rescues a dog whose skin is in an awful condition

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Jackson helps a couple who have been dating for seven years but are at risk of breaking up because their is a third person in their relationship - Steevs cat Darkness

programme.title: My Cat from Hell
programme.desc: Jackson Galaxy helps Orange County housewife Peggy, whose cats behaviour is getting out of hand

programme.title: Treehouse Masters
programme.sub-title: A Treehouse Fit for a Viking
programme.desc: Pete takes on his first international build in Norway. Working with local builder, Frode, the 24 ft high retreat gives stunning views of a nearby lake

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: New science and demonstrations reveal how cats can detect an earthquake seconds before it happens. Plus, how sea otters manage to keep warm in icy waters

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: More fun facts about the animal kingdom, including why some creatures live so long, the reason that cats purr and why elephants have trunks

programme.title: Extinct or Alive
programme.desc: Forrest Galante scours lakes and rivers of both metropolitan and rural Vietnam in search of one of the last living specimens of the giant softshell turtle

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People
programme.desc: The Browns try closing a deal to help restore a wind turbine, but when Browntown runs out of gas, they must get creative. Plus, Noah gets bad news from his girl

programme.title: Tanked
programme.desc: NBA star Dwyane Wade asks Wayde King and Brett Raymer to build him a temporary tank as he prepares to launch a new line of shoes

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: The Kilchers expand a road with the help of a detonation expert. Meanwhile, Atz Sr and Bonnie embark work together to salvage vital resources

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Jane and Charlotte protect their herd from bears, three generations of the Kilcher family build a shack on Perl Island, and Otto has a surprise for Charlotte

programme.desc: Jeremy gets his farmstead up and running, but unfinished business gets in the way. Plus, bears pose a threat to Jenny and her newborn baby while stranded on an island in a storm

programme.desc: Mireya and Ronny return to where they think they heard whistles and saw glowing eyes. Meanwhile, Mireya agrees to act as bait in order to lure out Bigfoot

programme.desc: Top scientists reveal how a revolutionary study and advanced DNA technology solved the mystery of the legendary Loch Ness monster

programme.title: Crikey! Its the Irwins
programme.desc: Steve Irwin loved sea turtles. Terri and Robert continue his legacy as they transport three rescued sea turtles to Lady Elliot Island on the Great Barrier Reef - for the first time, by air. This complex mission is vital in order to help conserve these beautiful but endangered animals. While Robert and Terri take to the skies, Bindi and the team are nervously waiting for the birth of Australia Zoos first Sumatran tiger cub in three years. Richie from the rescue unit helps with a baby wallabys struggle for survival

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Gail Porter presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on June 25, 1999. Featuring S Club 7, Jamiroquai, NSYNC, Britney Spears, Lit, Adam Rickitt, Melanie G and Vengaboys

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Gail Porter presents the pop chart programme, first broadcast on July 2, 1999. Featuring Vengaboys, Whitney Houston, The Three Amigos, Suede, A1, Jennifer Lopez and ATB

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Peter Powell hosts, featuring performances by Suzi Quatro, Dan Hill, Elvis Costello, the Vibrators, Kate Bush, Earth, Wind and Fire, Gerry Rafferty and the Manhattan Transfer. Plus, dance group Legs and Co. Originally broadcast on March 16, 1978

programme.title: Top of the Pops
programme.desc: Simon Bates and Peter Powell introduce the edition first aired on March 24, featuring performances by Sinitta, A-ha, Simon Harris, Wet Wet Wet, Debbie Gibson, Climie Fisher, Iron Maiden, Tiffany, Aswad and Whitney Houston

programme.title: Elkie Brooks: Sight and Sound in Concert
programme.desc: Annie Nightingale introduces Elkie Brooks at the Hippodrome, Golders Green in 1977. The concert was originally broadcast as part of the BBC Sight and Sound in Concert series, in which music shows were broadcast simultaneously on TV and radio, allowing viewers to enjoy better sound from their hi-fi speakers

programme.title: The Good Old Days
programme.desc: Leonard Sachs hosts a 1976 edition of the old-time music hall programme, with Roy Castle, Eartha Kitt, Barry Kent, Hinge and Bracket, the Halfwits and members of the Players Theatre, London among those entertaining an audience at the Leeds City Varieties

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: An arsonist terrorises a housing estate, and Hetty goes undercover in a quilt-making circle in her search for the culprit, while Robert is confined at home with a broken collarbone and has to content himself with Polaroid shots of his burgeoning runner bean crop

programme.title: Angela Rippon: Portrait
programme.desc: Paul Wyeth paints a portrait of the newsreader and broadcaster. First broadcast in1979

programme.title: Hidden Assets
programme.desc: When investigative reporter Olatz Alzola and her family are murdered in Bilbao, DS Claire Wallace is drawn into a case that links their killings to a Criminal Assets Bureau raid in Dublin. Return of the crime drama, starring Nora-Jane Noone. In English and Spanish

programme.title: Hidden Assets
programme.desc: Claire questions Alice, who reacts angrily, while Jon and Claire identify Adama and visit his student residence, only to find it trashed by ONeill. CAB detective Liam Boylan uncovers CCTV footage of a man arguing with Nick, and forensic accountant Norah Dillon discovers he was funnelling money into a Liechtenstein account. Claire and Jon focus on Adamas PhD supervisor Itziar Romero - unaware ONeill is targeting her too. In English and Spanish

programme.title: Parkinson
programme.sub-title: Gillian Anderson, Paul OGrady and Madness
programme.desc: The king of chat meets X Files star Gillian Anderson to discuss her life and career. Plus, interviews with comedians Paul Whitehouse and Paul OGrady - better known at the time as alter ego Lily Savage - and music by Eighties chart-toppers Madness, who perform classic hits It Must Be Love and Our House. From 2002

programme.title: Keeping Up Appearances
programme.desc: Hyacinth attends the christening of Daisys granddaughter, and is displeased to learn the childs parents are not married. With some encouragement from Richard, she agrees to keep an open mind, but is later irked when the mother and child go missing. Comedy, starring Patricia Routledge and Clive Swift

programme.title: Sorry!
programme.desc: Timothy decides to leave home, but his mother is outraged when she learns of his decision to share a flat with two young women

programme.title: Elaine Paige: 60 Years on Stage
programme.desc: The musical theatre star chats to Zoe Ball about her career, sharing anecdotes and insights from major West End and Broadway productions she has appeared in, including Hair, Evita, Cats, Chess, Piaf, Anything Goes, Sunset Boulevard and Follies. As well as stories about meeting royalty, working with Queen and Stephen Sondheim, and the instant fame that winning the much-coveted role of Eva Peron brought her, there are clips of some of the sensational show tunes she made famous

programme.title: Hetty Wainthropp Investigates
programme.desc: An arsonist terrorises a housing estate, and Hetty goes undercover in a quilt-making circle in her search for the culprit, while Robert is confined at home with a broken collarbone and has to content himself with Polaroid shots of his burgeoning runner bean crop

programme.title: Angela Rippon: Portrait
programme.desc: Paul Wyeth paints a portrait of the newsreader and broadcaster. First broadcast in1979

programme.title: Imagine
programme.sub-title: Rose Wylie: This Rose Is Blooming
programme.desc: Alan Yentob meets the painter, known for her exuberant, large-scale canvases that have been exhibited and sold all over the world. He discovers how her memories and experiences - including her childhood in the Blitz during the Second World War, have helped mould her into the artist she is today, and how she transforms the stuff of everyday experience into new and hitherto unseen painterly visions

programme.title: Elaine Paige: 60 Years on Stage
programme.desc: The musical theatre star chats to Zoe Ball about her career, sharing anecdotes and insights from major West End and Broadway productions she has appeared in, including Hair, Evita, Cats, Chess, Piaf, Anything Goes, Sunset Boulevard and Follies. As well as stories about meeting royalty, working with Queen and Stephen Sondheim, and the instant fame that winning the much-coveted role of Eva Peron brought her, there are clips of some of the sensational show tunes she made famous

programme.title: Elaine Paige Remembers - A Night on the Town
programme.desc: Elaine Paige looks back on the 1983 musical spectacular, filmed with a cast of singers and dancers such as Ann Reinking, Hinton Battle, Frank Gorshin and Eartha Kitt

programme.title: A Night on the Town
programme.desc: In the 1980s, a photographer and an advertising designer trying on clothes in a vintage clothing store find themselves transported to the 1930s. Musical showcasing the work of Irving Berlin, Noel Coward, George Gershwin and Cole Porter, starring Hinton Battle, Lewis Collins, Frank Gorshin, Eartha Kitt, John Moffatt, Elaine Paige, Ann Reinking and Bobby Short. First aired in 1983

programme.title: Charles Dance Remembers - Little Eyolf
programme.desc: The actor reflects on Michael Meyers 1982 adaptation of Henrik Ibsens play, in which he played Borghejm in one of his first major TV roles, Charles reveals why actors are constantly attracted to Ibsens writing, how the work was filmed in a way to keep it deliberately theatrical, and why the play and the subjects it tackles are as relevant as ever

programme.title: Little Eyolf
programme.desc: Michael Meyers 1982 adaptation of Henrik Ibsens psychological study of grief and guilt, starring Diana Rigg, Anthony Hopkins, Peggy Ashcroft and Charles Dance

programme.title: Mindful Escapes: Breathe, Release, Restore
programme.desc: Mindfulness expert Andy Puddicombe explains how watching scenes from nature can help bring feelings of positivity, happiness and wellbeing to the viewer

programme.title: Mindful Escapes: Breathe, Release, Restore
programme.desc: Mindfulness expert Andy Puddicombe explains how watching scenes from nature can help bring feelings of positivity, happiness and wellbeing to the viewer

programme.title: A Night on the Town

Musical showcasing the work of Irving Berlin, Noel Coward, George Gershwin and Cole Porter, starring Hinton Battle, Lewis Collins, Frank Gorshin, Eartha Kitt, John Moffatt, Elaine Paige, Ann Reinking and Bobby Short. programme.desc: A look ahead to the latest forecast

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus sports reports, weather forecasts and arts and entertainment features

programme.title: Saturday Kitchen Live
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt is joined by chefs Theo Randall, Samin Nosrat and Vito Coppola, and special guest Rebecca Lucy Taylor. Helen McGinn selects the drinks

programme.title: Flaming Feasts
programme.desc: Chef Chris Flamebaster Roberts cooks his way across Wales. In Cardigan, a coastal town where the River Teifi meets the sea, he meets the locals who teach him coracle fishing, share their driftwood crab feasts and show him how they make the local produce which he puts together in his final feast of wood-fired calzones

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Eric Knowles presents the show from Guildford, Surrey, with experts Raj Bisram and Stephanie Connell helping the teams. Eric also brings along an unusual-looking antique

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest forecast

programme.title: Match of the Day Live
programme.desc: Manchester United v Manchester City (Kick-off 1.30pm). All the action from the derby at Old Trafford. City claimed an impressive 3-0 win in Novembers reverse fixture and they have led the way at the top of the table for much of the campaign, but United will not have given up hope of winning the title themselves and a victory today would enhance their chances of catching their neighbours

programme.title: The Mask (1994)
programme.desc: A timid bank clerk stumbles on an ancient mask, which endows whoever wears it with untold superhuman powers, unbridled self-confidence and an irresistible charm for the ladies. Unfortunately, he earns the enmity of a local gangster for daring to flirt with his girlfriend - and when the crook gets wind of the artefacts existence, he covets the power for himself. Fantasy comedy, with Jim Carrey, Cameron Diaz, Peter Riegert and Peter Greene

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest forecast

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: Bradley and Barney Walsh welcome back four finalist contenders to take on the Gladiators, and each other, for the title of champion in the grand final. Viper leaves the Gladiators gobsmacked, Bradley races Electro on the track, and much to Guy Mowbrays surprise, Legend tries his hand at commentary

programme.title: Michael McIntyres The Wheel
programme.desc: The comedian hosts the Saturday-night game show, as contestants take on a colossal spinning wheel and answer questions in the hope of securing a cash prize. Celebrity experts offering advice are Liza Tarbuck on art, Iain Stirling on Scotland, Rachel Riley on maths, Trevor Nelson on disco, GK Barry on celebrities, Gabby Logan on the Six Nations and Chris McCausland on Back to the Future

programme.title: Big Night of Musicals 2026 by the National Lottery
programme.desc: Jason Manford hosts the annual showcase of musical theatre from the AO Arena in Manchester, featuring a preview of forthcoming new West End productions of Miss Saigon and Jesus Christ Superstar, with Sam Ryder making his debut as Jesus. Featuring Alexandra Burke performing numbers from Im Every Woman: The Chaka Khan Musical, hits from The Producers, Wicked, The Lion King, Oliver!, Sunny Afternoon and Paddington The Musical, and a performance from Annie featuring La Voix

programme.title: The Walsh Sisters
programme.desc: Chaquie helps Rachel get ready for an important event for Anna. On the way, Celine and Rachel stop by the Walsh house - only to discover Anna is missing. Claire drops Kate off to James, but their tense exchange leaves her questioning how their co-parenting arrangement is working. Also, after an argument between the sisters, a quiet moment of unity pulls them back together

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest forecast

programme.title: The Shallows (2016)
programme.desc: A surfer strays into the hunting territory of a great white shark, and finds herself stranded on a tiny island a mere 200 yards from the shore. With the deadly aquatic predator between her and the beach and her safe haven slowly disappearing as the tide comes in, she faces a life or death struggle to get safely back to dry land. Thriller, starring Blake Lively and Oscar Jaenada

programme.title: The Claudia Winkleman Show
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr joins Claudia to talk about series two of Last One Laughing, Chase Infiniti speaks about her role in The Testaments - the sequel to The Handmaids Tale - and Lisa Kudrow talks about sitcom The Comeback. Meanwhile, Jamie Dornan previews Saturday Night Live UK, which he is guest hosting

programme.title: The Womens Football Show
programme.desc: Highlights of the weekends matches in the Super League, including Everton v Liverpool, Arsenal v Tottenham Hotspur and Manchester United v Manchester City

programme.title: Sunday with Laura Kuenssberg
programme.desc: Interviews with key politicians and public figures

programme.title: Sunday Politics Northern Ireland
programme.desc: Mark Carruthers looks at the political developments of the week and questions policy makers on the key issues

programme.title: Pilgrimage
programme.desc: The pilgrims head north-east to Moray on the edge of the Highlands and their first stop is Pluscarden Abbey, Britains only working medieval monastery. Keen to see how these current day Benedictine monks live and work, the pilgrims stay overnight, and sample some of the routines of monastic life, which includes helping with domestic duties

programme.title: Homes Under the Hammer
programme.desc: Two bungalows in Derbyshire and Norfolk offer up lots of potential. Dion Dublin is impressed by the space on offer in a Liverpool mid-terrace

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross presents the show from Detling, Kent, with Stephanie Connell and John Cameron aiding the teams. Charlie also looks at a small collection dating from the 18th century

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.desc: A look ahead to the latest forecast

programme.title: Songs of Praise
programme.desc: The Rev Kate Bottley explores how the story of the Last Supper encapsulates so much of Jesus life, death and resurrection, and how it is significant about it for Christians today

programme.title: Lifeline
programme.desc: An appeal for funds on behalf of a registered charity

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: Bradley and Barney Walsh welcome back four finalist contenders to take on the Gladiators, and each other, for the title of champion in the grand final. Viper leaves the Gladiators gobsmacked, Bradley races Electro on the track, and much to Guy Mowbrays surprise, Legend tries his hand at commentary

programme.title: Crookhaven
programme.desc: Gabriel and Penelope face-off and go to extreme lengths to dig for dirt, while Ade and Ede learn that its risky to trust a crook

programme.title: Crookhaven
programme.desc: The school goes into lockdown when the Nameless attack. Gabriel and the gang are on a mission to discover the family secrets that Crookhaven is keeping hidden

programme.title: Attenboroughs Life in Colour
programme.desc: David Attenborough explores the many ways animals use colour, with specially built cameras revealing a world normally invisible to human eyes. The peacocks tail has evolved entirely to impress females and is one of the most extreme colour ornaments in the natural world, while mandrill baboons signal their strength and status with striking red and blue face masks, the brighter the colours, the higher ranking the male

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Weather
programme.desc: The latest forecast

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.sub-title: St Michaels Mount: After the Storm
programme.desc: Sean Fletcher and Anita Rani head to St Michaels Mount in Cornwall after Storm Goretti. Hurricane-force winds ripped through the island, leaving the tiny community of just 33 residents facing a huge clean-up. With Easter approaching, they join the race to repair the damage, restore the landscape and reopen this iconic landmark to visitors. Plus, Datshiane Navanayagam investigates the rise of youth homelessness in rural Britain

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce presents from Firstsite contemporary art gallery in Colchester, Essex, where treasures include a wartime wedding dress, an instruction book on the ancient art of paper folding, and a copper dish twice rescued from a skip. Fiona delves into the brutal Roman history of Colchester, and discovers the three items that have most influenced Miscellaneous and Collectables expert Mark Hill

programme.title: The Other Bennet Sister
programme.desc: Mary prepares for her official debut in London society, buoyed by her friendship with Ann and the attentions of Mr Ryder. But a run-in with her old rival Caroline Bingley threatens her growing confidence. Mary faces up to her old rival at a dinner party, while an urgent message from home throws everything into uncertainty

programme.title: The Other Bennet Sister
programme.desc: Mary rushes to Pemberley, fearing her mother is gravely ill, only to be thrown back into the demands of family life. She begins to lose hope of ever returning to London, until Mr Ryder unexpectedly turns up. His clear admiration for Mary helps the family to recognise how much she has changed. As excitement mounts over Mr Ryders visit, Mary finds herself on the brink of a momentous decision

programme.title: The Capture
programme.desc: Carey is under pressure to charge James Whitlock. Her failure to reach Napier leads to her facing the consequences of her actions, but an unlikely group of allies presents itself. Pierson must convince his colleagues that he is fit for the job, and an off-the-record military group seek advice from the mysterious Simon on how to get their plans back on track. A deadly trap is set for Rachel Care

programme.title: The Proposal (2009)
programme.desc: A Canadian publishing editor working in New York faces deportation to her own country. Desperate to stay in America, she offers her assistant a promotion if he will marry her, but an immigration official becomes suspicious and the pair are forced to go to desperate lengths to look like a happy couple. Romantic comedy, starring Sandra Bullock and Ryan Reynolds

programme.title: Have I Got News for You
programme.desc: Angela Rippon hosts the satirical quiz, with comedian Jo Brand and writer and broadcaster Richard Osman joining team captains Paul Merton and Ian Hislop as they delve into the weeks news stories

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Weather for the Week Ahead
programme.desc: A look ahead to the latest forecast

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: A round-up of national and international news, plus current affairs, arts and entertainment, and weather

programme.title: Divergent: Allegiant (2016)
programme.desc: Rebels fighting for freedom in a strictly ordered society escapes from the walled city they live in. They find themselves in a strange and dangerous new world, where they face a battle for their own survival and of those they have left behind. Third in the sci-fi adventure series based on Veronica Roths novels, starring Shailene Woodley, Theo James and Naomi Watts

programme.title: My Mates a Bad Date
programme.desc: Twenty-one-year-old Khalil from Nottingham cannot get a second date. Oloni thinks that remembering his dates names, dropping the baby girl tag and cooling off on the bragging might help his chances

programme.title: The Trials of Pa Salieu
programme.desc: Documentary following the British-Gambian musician as he attempts to rebuild his life and career after prison, returning to live performance while still on probation, navigating curfews, travel restrictions and the risk of recall. He makes his comeback at the Glastonbury Festival, but touring in Europe hangs in the balance, and he faces a choice between breaking commitments and risking a return to prison

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.desc: Clara and the Doctor arrive at a haunted mansion in the 1970s, where a gifted psychic and a professor are searching for a spirit who is said to have appeared in the building over the years. But the so-called Witch of the Well soon turns out to be more than your average ghost. Jessica Raine and Dougray Scott guest star

programme.title: Doctor Who
programme.sub-title: Journey to the Centre of the Tardis
programme.desc: The Tardis is captured by a spaceship salvage team, sending its systems into meltdown. The Doctor realises Clara is still trapped within his malfunctioning ship, so he persuades the motley crew to help find her, taking them deep into the heart of his beloved blue box. But monsters from the future have been unleashed and they only have 30 minutes before the Tardis self-destructs. Ashley Walters guest stars

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Alison and Mike discover their neighbour has been scheming behind their backs - his outlandish tactics threatening the success of their guesthouse business. For Alison, this warrants all out war and she sets about playing him at his own game. If she is going to stoop to such trickery however, shell need the help of one of the ghosts. Mike attempts to mix things up for future guests at the gatehouse by secretly investing in some not-so-cheap entertainment that Alison will definitely not approve of. Meanwhile, the Captain makes a discovery, leading the other ghosts to find a surprising new friend

programme.title: Ghosts
programme.desc: Alison and Mike receive some exciting news about their guesthouse business, but the fallout soon sees tensions running high between the pair. Pat and Thomas learn about the challenges of veganism, Kitty attempts to adopt a new way of communicating that sparks confusion between her and Alison. Lady Button is delighted by a new arrival that allows her to tap into a past passion. Robin however is less charmed by the new addition. Julian is confronted by a hard truth, but is determined to prove everyone wrong. Alison and Mike reach boiling point as Robin comes face to face with his biggest fear

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Agnes is feeling down in the dumps. The house is a mess, she cant seem to get any sleep and - to make things worse - Marias home remedies end in disaster. Will the family show her some much-needed and long overdue appreciation? Cmedy, starring Brendan OCarroll

programme.title: Mrs Browns Boys
programme.desc: Agnes decides to try out speed-dating at Foleys, while a promotional scheme by Buster and Dermot backfires for the salon. Later, the arrival of a new neighbour puts Agnes and Winnies friendship to the test. Comedy, starring Brendan OCarroll, with Danny OCarroll, Paddy Houlihan and Eilish OCarroll

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Friendship, loyalty, laughter and lots of mischief bring Cork inner-city teenagers and best friends Conor and Jock into conflict with their headmaster - leaving Conors mother to pick up the pieces. To add fuel to the fire, the lads strike up friendships with the headmasters daughters. First episode of the comedy, starring Alex Murphy and Chris Walley

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Conor and Jocks friendships with Principal Walshs daughters intensify, causing awkward tension between the lads, the principal, and Linda and Siobhan themselves. Mrs Walsh is intent on her husband giving the lads a chance, but despite everyones best intentions, things get out of hand when the duo crash a Walsh family barbecue. Comedy, starring Alex Murphy and Chris Walley

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: After the disastrous encounter at the Walsh family barbecue, Conor and Jock reason that there is only one option left to get Linda and Siobhan to really fall for them - spend a whole day together on a beautiful adventure. Maireads plan to invite a friend over for dinner doesnt go down well with Conor. Comedy, starring Alex Murphy and Chris Walley

programme.title: Long Story Short
programme.desc: Desperate to impress his crush, awkward fresher Rohan turns to an online masculinity coach for advice, but begins to question if alpha status is all its cracked up to be

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Conor and Maireads much-loved fridge finally gives up on them. Remembering the item was originally bought in a town many miles away, Mairead decides that a family trip to that same place to buy a replacement will be just the thing to bond with her son. After some discussion Jock is eventually included, bringing along his keen navigation skills and unique sense of entertainment to pass the time. During the journey, all the travellers learn lessons about family connections. Comedy, starring Alex Murphy and Chris Walley

programme.title: Long Story Short
programme.desc: A shy 17-year-old outsider is marked for abduction as part of his new home towns terrifying tradition. He must evade capture and make it through the night, navigating love, friendship and events that are beyond explanation

programme.title: Long Story Short
programme.desc: A woman who has known she has a double since she was a 10 vows to confront her, and take back control of her life after a decade of intense and bitter rivalry

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Money is getting increasingly tight in the McSweeney household, prompting Conor and Jock to come up with inventive and unsatisfying ways of making food last longer. Determined to help Mairead financially, the lads think about ways they can come up with some extra cash, eventually arriving at an ill-advised plan. Meanwhile, Mairead and Sergeant Healy are in two minds about taking their friendship to the next level. Comedy, starring Alex Murphy and Chris Walley

programme.title: Long Story Short
programme.desc: An aspiring comedian must choose between sanitising his set and embracing his voice after a controversial performance results in further gigs being cancelled

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Conor and Jock make a plan to take a bus journey but not before Jock, posing as Fake Billy, swipes some alcopops from an off-licence and is unsuccessfully pursued by a security guard. Local bully Billy Murphy stumbles upon this chase, and follows his impersonator onto a bus which he proceeds to accidentally commandeer. Pursued by police, the wild ride ironically brings Conor, Jock and the girls closer together - along with the other innocent passengers. Comedy, starring Alex Murphy and Chris Walley

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Fortitude star Robert Sheehan appears as himself in this festive episode of the sitcom. The residents of the council estate where Conor and Jock live are threatened with eviction, but are not about to go down without a fight - and the resulting media circus puts everyone on edge. In the midst of all this mayhem, Conors mother Mairead is rushed to hospital, and may be more seriously ill than previously thought. When she says she wants to see a white Christmas, the lads vow to make her wish come true - with a little help from Sheehan, who is shooting a film nearby

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Documentary following boxer Tommy Furys return to the ring. Tommy is at his lowest point personally and professionally, living alone in a house that was meant to be his and partner Molly-Maes forever home. His role as a father to baby Bambi brings both joy and pressure as he tries to convince Molly-Mae he is a changed man. After finally getting the medical all-clear to fight again, Tommy and his trainer and father John prepare for his return to the ring against MMA fighter Darren Till. Team Fury travels to the press conference - with John promising to be on his best behaviour

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: The Truemans prepare to welcome a visitor. After Suki dismisses Vinnys olive branch, Eve encourages her to put aside her differences. Bea puts on an overbearing act as Honey arrives home, and she later comes to blows with Linda who questions her motives

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Honey meets Bea in the cafe and asks her to move out of No.18, but Bea heads to McClunkys and orders everyone to leave before trashing the shop when her emotions get the better of her. Zoe is blindsided, while the Panesars and the Brannings attempt to bond

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Penny tells Vinny he doesnt need to buy her expensive gifts in return for her love, but she is shocked when Vinny reveals he has put a deposit down on a shop in Turpin Road for her. The Slaters put on a show of family unity, and Bea lies that she was attacked to garner sympathy

programme.title: EastEnders
programme.desc: Cindy finds herself in hot water, Bea orchestrates a plan, and Vicki supports Zack. Penny accepts Vinnys offer of a shop after words of encouragement from Gina and Harry. However, Suki accuses Penny of using Vinny for money

programme.title: Sort Your Life Out with Stacey Solomon
programme.sub-title: When You Find Out You Have 468 Wax Melts
programme.desc: The team arrive in the Midlands to help dads Craig and Craig, whose home is jam-packed with toys belonging to their beloved five-year-old daughter - not only the ones she plays with now, but everything she has ever owned, which salon owner Big Craig has kept hold of for fear of losing part of her childhood. But as the process begins, Stacey finds more clutter, from almost 200 pairs of shoes to 400 tampons - which Little Craig collected for the homeless but never got round to donating

programme.title: Boarders
programme.desc: Its final exams, and everyone is feeling the pressure. Leah is stressed that Felix will drag her down, but things are about to get a lot worse for them both. Toby makes a big play to try and cling on to his Cambridge offer and keep Abby. Femi is threatened by Cheddar, but Pixie helps him fight back. On the pitch, the hockey girls face their rivals, while Omars secret whips up the tension

programme.title: Boarders
programme.desc: Its nearly time for the boarders to say goodbye to St Gilberts. Femi is forced to choose between love and ambition, Omar finally tries to right his wrongs, and Toby makes a life-changing decision. With only one exam left to go, Leah cracks under the pressure. Can her friends bring her back from the brink? Final episode of the sitcom

programme.title: Long Story Short
programme.desc: Short films by new writers and directors. A woman from the West Country meets a man from the future, who might just hold the key to saving the planet. But the closer she gets to him, the more she suspects his story hides something darker

programme.title: Long Story Short
programme.desc: Lonely and disaffected Mabel finds a connection over a pineapple in the local supermarket. Comedy short by Rachelle Atalla, starring Harmony Rose Bremner and Dylan Blore

programme.title: Film Club
programme.desc: The day has finally come for Noa to leave, but Evie might not let him go that easily and it is not the only big decision she has to face

programme.title: The Young Offenders
programme.desc: Jock misses the first scan of his and Siobhans baby, so her parents come up with a plan to adopt the child. The suggestion doesnt go down well with anyone, so to test Jocks ability to look after a child, Principal Walsh challenges him to take care of an egg for a full month - without losing or breaking it. Comedy, starring Alex Murphy and Chris Walley

programme.title: Long Story Short
programme.desc: Consumed by his jealousy of his best friends sudden career success, Vasillys resentment festers, feeding a dark, supernatural force within him

programme.title: The Trials of Pa Salieu
programme.desc: Documentary following the British-Gambian musician as he attempts to rebuild his life and career after prison, returning to live performance while still on probation, navigating curfews, travel restrictions and the risk of recall. He makes his comeback at the Glastonbury Festival, but touring in Europe hangs in the balance, and he faces a choice between breaking commitments and risking a return to prison

programme.title: Tommy: The Good. The Bad. The Fury
programme.desc: Tommy receives news of the untimely death of boxing legend Ricky Hatton, which reminds him to live life to its fullest. He then sets out on the most gruelling test of endurance possible - climbing the three highest mountains in England, Scotland and Wales in just 24 hours. At Halloween, Tommy and John go pumpkin picking with Bambi, things are back on track with Molly, and the house renovation is almost completed

programme.title: Boarders
programme.desc: Its final exams, and everyone is feeling the pressure. Leah is stressed that Felix will drag her down, but things are about to get a lot worse for them both. Toby makes a big play to try and cling on to his Cambridge offer and keep Abby. Femi is threatened by Cheddar, but Pixie helps him fight back. On the pitch, the hockey girls face their rivals, while Omars secret whips up the tension

programme.title: Boarders
programme.desc: Its nearly time for the boarders to say goodbye to St Gilberts. Femi is forced to choose between love and ambition, Omar finally tries to right his wrongs, and Toby makes a life-changing decision. With only one exam left to go, Leah cracks under the pressure. Can her friends bring her back from the brink? Final episode of the sitcom

programme.title: Panorama
programme.desc: Colletta Smith investigates the rising cost-of-living impact for communities as rising prices, wages and higher taxes push businesses and families to the brink. Prime Minister Keir Starmer said that 2026 would be the year that more people would begin to feel positive change, but independent experts say we may have to wait a little longer before we notice a few extra pounds in our pockets

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.sub-title: North East England and Yorkshire: Judging
programme.desc: Its judging day, and only one chef can go through to represent north east England and Yorkshire. Judges Tom Kerridge, Lorna McNee, and Phil Wang are joined by screenwriter and author Frank Cottrell-Boyce, who helps decide the winner from the two remaining chefs. Andi Oliver hosts

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: Reunited to protect themselves from intruding male lions, the Xudum pride mothers now struggle to feed so many mouths. Tsebe has four cubs, and her smallest is close to starving. When he becomes injured and then lost, his life is on a knife edge

programme.title: The Other Bennet Sister
programme.desc: Mary is finding her footing in London, but overhears something which knocks her newfound confidence. Mr Hayward introduces her to poetry, but their budding connection is complicated by Mr Haywards engagement. As Mary wrestles with troubling new feelings, she finds herself caught between duty, a new friendship and the possibility of love

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: Nuggets new fitness device sparks a craze on the berg, with the Piris battling it out to score the most points

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: Cosima and Big Lizard camp out with a little crab

programme.title: The Weasy Family
programme.desc: The ducklings witness an experiment on the Farm of the Future that could solve their problem in the form of a device that makes you grow

programme.title: Super Happy Magic Forest
programme.desc: When Hoofius plays his grandfauns old magical panpipes, his friends do exactly what he asks them to do

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy decides to adopt a coconut

programme.title: Grizzy and the Lemmings
programme.desc: Grizzy pretends to have a twisted ankle so that the Lemmings have to take care of him

programme.title: Game on Grandparents
programme.desc: Guided by pro gamer Slogo, the teams serve up an epic game of Switch Sports Volleyball. Who will score more points and earn a place in the final?

programme.title: Bros in Control
programme.desc: Callum challenges the brothers to take his giant rubber duck to water as Adam decides to takes Quakius Maximus to the skies. Joe and Adam both face the Gladiators referees

programme.title: Gladiators: Epic Pranks
programme.desc: Nitro and JB Gill bring boy band chaos as they turn Electros pop song into a note-perfect prank with weird warm-ups, hoodie rage, cheesy pop video moves and snowball choreography

programme.title: Blue Peter
programme.sub-title: Super Dogs and the Magic Faraway Tree
programme.desc: We celebrate seven years of Blue Peter pet dog Henry and meet incredible rescue dogs trained to take on the toughest mountains. We also meet the cast of new film The Magic Faraway Tree.

programme.title: Newsround
programme.desc: Current affairs reports aimed at a younger audience

programme.title: Gardeners World
programme.desc: Monty Don is busy with spring and planning ahead for summer. Hes doing a seed-sowing masterclass, cutting back Cornus and dividing ferns to put in the new Woodland Garden. Frances Tophill is exploring the tiny but expansive world of miniature daffodils at a nursery with hundreds of cultivars. And in Llanelli, Sue Kent meets a gardener who has set up her own seed library, helping to preserve varieties of flowers and edibles which flourish in local Welsh soil and beyond

programme.title: All About Eve (1950)
programme.desc: An ageing stage star is flattered by the attention of an adoring fan, and decides to take the young woman under her wing as her personal assistant - unaware that her new protegee is really a ruthlessly ambitious, budding actor who will do all that it takes to steal the limelight. Oscar-winning drama, starring Bette Davis, Anne Baxter, George Sanders, Thelma Ritter, Marilyn Monroe and Celeste Holm

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.sub-title: North East England and Yorkshire: Starter and Fish
programme.desc: Four chefs compete for north east England and Yorkshire with blockbuster canapes, starters and fish dishes celebrating the British film industry. The judge is chef and long-time friend of the competition Paul Ainsworth. Dishes include a pearl barley dal with a Gladiator theme and a black-and-white monkfish that celebrates Newcastle film noir

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Alistair Appleton helps a couple find a new home in Dorset and meets a pair who have diversified their family farm and now run a hospitality business with luxury shepherds huts

programme.title: Flog It!
programme.desc: The team visits Folkestone, Kent, where experts Mark Stacey and Nick Hall offer advice on antiques brought to the valuation day, and Paul Martin investigates the work of Victorian architect Augustus Pugin at the house he built in nearby Ramsgate

programme.title: The Ipcress File (1965)
programme.desc: An intelligence agent investigating the kidnap and brainwashing of Britains most renowned scientists unpicks a complex chain of connections and high-level intrigue, while detecting evidence of double-dealing and counter-espionage. Spy thriller based on Len Deightons novel, starring Michael Caine, Sue Lloyd, Gordon Jackson and Nigel Green.

programme.title: Earths Great Rivers
programme.desc: A journey along the American river, whose fingers stretch into nearly half of the USA, collecting water from 31 states. The documentary follows the Mississippi through varied landscapes from its source to its mouth, starting in the towering Rocky Mountains of Wyoming and Montana, where billions of tons of water, ultimately destined to flow south are trapped as ice and snow

programme.title: Super League Live
programme.desc: Leigh Leopards v Toulouse Olympique (Kick-off 5.30pm). All the action from the match at Progress with Unity Stadium. The Leopards performed well last term, reaching the semi-finals, but struggled for form in the early stages of the current season. This is Toulouses maiden Super League campaign and they have acquitted themselves well so far

programme.title: Celebrity Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: The friendship of reality TVs Chris Hughes and Jake Quickenden is put to the test as they explore South Yorkshires antique shops with Izzie Balmer and Irita Marriott. A 19th-century milk jug attracts Chriss eye, while an unusual four-spouted teapot gets Jake excited

programme.title: Inside Britains National Parks
programme.desc: Documentary looking at four of Britains 15 national parks, capturing the sights and sounds of these unique places and meeting the people who live and work there. The opening edition visits the New Forest, once a royal hunting ground for William the Conqueror and now a mosaic of open heathlands, ancient woodlands, coastline and picturesque villages. The park is home to ponies, deer, rare bird species and reptiles, while the traditional grazing practices of generations of commoners sustain this landscape, with their ponies and pigs roaming freely throughout the park

programme.title: Show Tunes at the BBC: Volume 3
programme.desc: Elaine Paige guides viewers through another treasure trove of musical theatre moments from the BBC archives. With classic numbers from Hello, Dolly! to Les Miserables, Chess to South Pacific, the programme features memorable performances from artists including Shirley Bassey, Michael Buble, Fred Astaire, Alison Moyet, Louis Armstrong and Elaine herself

programme.title: Show Tunes at the BBC: Volume 2
programme.desc: As The Big Night of Musicals ends on BBC One, Elaine Paige keeps the show running by rustling up a fresh selection of tunes from favourite musicals, including Les Miserables, Oklahoma!, Hamilton and Joseph and the Amazing Technicolor Dreamcoat. The performances, all taken from the BBC archive, feature the likes of Shirley Bassey, Alfie Boe, Hugh Jackman and Barbara Dickson, as well as a set of full cast ensembles

programme.title: Barra on the Foyle
programme.desc: Barra Best makes a journey across the river network, meeting people who work, live and play along its banks,and exploring places and landscapes rarely seen on TV screens

programme.title: Good Vibrations (2012)
programme.desc: A music lover in 1970s Belfast opens a record shop while his city is torn apart by the Troubles. His business introduces him to the citys underground punk scene, and he becomes one of the key figures in creating an alternative subculture to the violence around him. Fact-based drama, starring Richard Dormer, Jodie Whittaker, Liam Cunningham and Dylan Moran

programme.title: Show Tunes at the BBC
programme.desc: Elaine Paige guides viewers through a selection of songs from musicals from the BBC archives, including numbers from Cats, The Lion King, Funny Girl, My Fair Lady, Sunset Boulevard, West Side Story, A Little Night Music and The Sound of Music

programme.title: Sings Musicals
programme.desc: Memorable versions of songs taken from or inspired by musicals. The programme features Ella Fitzgerald singing Mack the Knife, from The Threepenny Opera, Captain Sensibles 1982 chart-topper Happy Talk, a cover of a song from South Pacific, and performances by Jeff Beck and Jay-Z

programme.title: The Capture
programme.desc: Carey searches for one suspect, while Frank Napier deals with another. As the evidence mounts and Carey is forced to avert another catastrophe, she begins to fear she might have made a terrible mistake. Piersons first day on the job gets ever more challenging, but as the net tightens for James Whitlock, it looks like SO15 might have made a breakthrough in the case

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: A to Z of TV Gardening
programme.desc: Carol Kirkwood takes an alphabetical journey through the world of horticulture, beginning at the letter A with archive material from Gardeners World, Countryfile and The Gardeners Year

programme.title: Take a Hike
programme.desc: The first of five countryside walks in the Highlands and Islands, with teacher and army cadet trainer Daisy leading a hike up Stac Pollaidh, one of Scotlands best-known mountains

programme.title: Countryfile
programme.desc: A look at life after dark on the North York Moors. At the Dark Skies Festival, Margherita Taylor finds out how light pollution is affecting nocturnal wildlife, while Sammi Kinghorn meets the people gathering vital dark-sky data and installing wildlife-friendly lighting to help protect the night. Plus, Adam Henson meets apprentices at a cattle mart meeting

programme.title: My Kind of Town
programme.desc: Ian Hamilton and his guide dog Major head to Campbeltown in Argyll and Bute, where he tries his hand at blind golf at the world-famous Machrihanish course and helps on the production line with the woman who made the chocolates for the Oscars gift bag

programme.title: My Kind of Town
programme.desc: Ian Hamilton and his guide dog Major visit Blairgowrie and Rattray in Perth and Kinross, asking those who live there how they feel about the place and what its future might hold

programme.title: Saturday Kitchen Best Bites
programme.desc: Matt Tebbutt presents more highlights, with recipes from Niklas Ekstedt, Vivek Singh, Shivi Ramoutar and Big Zu, while singer Loyle Carner faces his food heaven or hell

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.sub-title: North East England and Yorkshire: Main and Dessert
programme.desc: The remaining three chefs from north east England and Yorkshire compete over mains and desserts inspired by the British film industry. The dishes are judged by veteran judge Paul Ainswort, which include a creation using duck, fresh fig and king oyster mushrooms to show what the kestrel in the classic film Kes might see whilst flying over the moors

programme.title: Great British Menu
programme.sub-title: North East England and Yorkshire: Judging
programme.desc: Its judging day, and only one chef can go through to represent north east England and Yorkshire. Judges Tom Kerridge, Lorna McNee, and Phil Wang are joined by screenwriter and author Frank Cottrell-Boyce, who helps decide the winner from the two remaining chefs. Andi Oliver hosts

programme.title: Mary Berry - Love to Cook
programme.desc: Mary cooks four recipes that prove watching the pennies does not mean having to sacrifice on flavour. They include a crab courgetti spaghetti dish that uses tinned fish at a fraction of the cost of fresh. Plus, a spinach filo swirl demonstrates an inventive way of stretching six sausages to feed the family

programme.title: Figure Skating
programme.desc: Action from the annual event, held at O2 Arena in Prague, Czech Republic. A number of the stars of the rescent Winter Olympics in Italy were expected to be involved

programme.title: Evil Under the Sun (1982)
programme.desc: Hercule Poirot braves the heat and sand to investigate the murder of a glamorous stage star on an idyllic Adriatic holiday island. It becomes clear many people had reason to want the temperamental actress dead and the Belgian sleuth is soon hard at work figuring out which of her enemies eventually managed to kill her. Mystery, starring Peter Ustinov, Diana Rigg, James Mason, Maggie Smith and Jane Birkin.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7
programme.desc: Reunited to protect themselves from intruding male lions, the Xudum pride mothers now struggle to feed so many mouths. Tsebe has four cubs, and her smallest is close to starving. When he becomes injured and then lost, his life is on a knife edge

programme.title: This Farming Life
programme.desc: Callum and Zara believe last years heavy lamb losses were due in part to bird predation and are hoping new tactics will protect them. Having at last made it to Scotland, Lucy and Adam face yet more hurdles and tough decisions about the future of their dairy herd, while Emma and the kids run the farm while Rob is away and prepare to welcome visitors for Spring Fun Day

programme.title: Burma with Simon Reeve
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part documentary exploring the country in the aftermath of the recent humanitarian crisis in which thousands of Rohingya Muslims were driven from their homes by the military. Simon visits Burmas Buddhist heartlands, including the ancient capital of Bagan, and meets the citys controversial nationalist monks. While the region affected by the military crackdown is off limits, he is able to visit the worlds biggest refugee camp in Bangladesh, and meet people traumatised by the violence

programme.title: Forensics: The Real CSI
programme.desc: A woman calls 999 to report that her 11-year-old daughter returned from staying at her dads house and claimed that a stranger came into her bedroom in the night and sexually assaulted her. A forensic team immediately heads to the crime scene, and the house is examined for potential forensic evidence the suspect may have left behind

programme.title: Tubaiste sa Phortach
programme.desc: Journalist Kevin Magee investigates the story of a Wellington bomber that took off from an RAF base in Limavady in February 1943 and crashed in Co Donegal, killing all six crew members. Kevin tracks down pilot Leonard Ashby Courts surviving son Ian in Leicestershire and accompanies the 84-year old as he fulfils a lifelong ambition by finally paying his respects at the site where his father died. In Irish

programme.title: Cumasc: Seisiúin sa Black Gate
programme.desc: French double bass virtuoso Renaud Garcia-Fons and Irish fiddler and composer Zoë Conway set forth on a journey of musical collaboration. In Irish

programme.title: Sunday Politics Northern Ireland
programme.desc: Mark Carruthers looks at the political developments of the week and questions policy makers on the key issues

programme.title: Mortimer and Whitehouse: Gone Fishing
programme.desc: Bob Mortimer and Paul Whitehouse travel overseas for an Irish fishing trip on the River Finn, their first time angling in the waters of both the Republic of Ireland and Northern Ireland as they try to catch salmon. The Emerald Isle has some of the most prolific river runs for salmon in Western Europe, and its wet climate provides some of the best conditions for salmon fishing

programme.title: Chronicles of the Sperrins
programme.desc: Caroline from Conservation Detection Dogs NI along with Monty the spaniel are on a special mission to sniff out the location of an extremely rare native plant, which botanists are keen to study and protect. For night sky hunter Martin, summer sees him waiting hours to see if any magical noctilucent clouds will appear

programme.title: Question Time
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce hosts the topical debate Clacton-on-Sea, Essex, where the audience put questions to Justice Minister Jake Richards, the Conservative former Security Minister Tom Tugendhat, Layla Moran from the Liberal Democrats and businessman and TV personality Thomas Skinner

programme.title: Clash of the Superpowers: America vs China
programme.desc: The inside story of how America and China have become locked in a battle for global power and influence since Donald Trump first took office. The documentary begins with Trump inauguration in 2017, when he upended the USs relationship with Beijing. He promised to make China pay - but when he started a trade war, Xi Jinping was ready to fight back

programme.title: This Is BBC Two
programme.desc: Preview of upcoming programmes from BBC Two

programme.title: Just One Thing
programme.desc: Clive Myrie meets distillery manager Luke in Bristol to explain how swapping his coffee and energy drinks for tea could lower his stress levels, reduce anxiety, calm the brain and support heart health

programme.title: The Repair Shop on the Road
programme.desc: The team is in Clackmannanshire hoping to revive Alloa Co-op Bowling Clubs faded and warped sign in their centenary year. Meanwhile, Dom Chinea delivers a 19th-century regulator clock from the Hebrides with a ghostly connection, and Will Kirk heads north to Rothes in Moray to learn the craft behind forging traditional copper stills for the multibillion-dollar whisky industry

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Christina Trevanion presents from Shepton Mallet, Somerset as Raj Bisram and Thomas Forrester help two teams find profitable antiques to sell at auction. Sisters Jess and Jo, guided by Thomas Forrester, are looking for something that jumps out at them from the get-go

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Bike aficionado Tim Gunn tries to make a bent unicycle roadworthy once more for Heather from Winchester, who bought it as a gift for her late husband Perry. Mark Stuckey is entrusted with a canary yellow 1980s cassette player that belonged to owner Florences mum Mel. Other items are an Edwardian brass plate camera and a one-of-a-kind 3-D model of an adenovirus - the virus responsible for the common cold - made by an electron microscopist back in the 1960s

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: A round-up of the latest headlines

programme.title: My Paranormal Nightmare
programme.desc: People share their experiences with destructive spirits. Courtney has a secret activity that entices a violent poltergeist into her home, and their voice is captured on audio tape. An evil spirit confuses and conspires against Dan, causing the young boy to become deathly ill. Ed endures nightly attacks from a brutal beast that also assaults a visiting family friend

programme.title: In Search of Aliens
programme.desc: Experts join the trail of purported Nazi time travel device, Die Glocke, to try and find out if it really did exist and if it could it have been based on alien technology

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.sub-title: The First Fish Is the Hardest
programme.desc: New competitors and old rivals prepare for the first week of a new season in Gloucester, Massachusetts

programme.title: Wicked Tuna
programme.desc: Captain Paul Herbert still has not landed his first tuna after a weeks fishing, and vows to prove wrong those who claim he is nothing without his former first mate

programme.title: Wicked Tuna

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion
programme.desc: The war against pythons invading the Everglades begins as Troy Landry, his son Chase and snake expert Bill uncover the sepents breeding grounds

programme.title: Swamp People: Serpent Invasion

programme.desc: Scientists study claims of a dead mermaid discovered and preserved in Japan. Plus a glowing-eyed sea creature captured on video chasing a motorboat and the connection between a man who lived alone in the jungle for over a quarter of a century and a fabled lost city in the Amazon

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.sub-title: Alien Sabotage, Ghost Child and Hungry Hungry Sasquatch
programme.desc: An examination of several seemingly impossible things caught on film. A species of carnivorous marsupials, thought to be long extinct, are suspected of being caught on camera. Plus, the notion that a visitor at a historic cemetery in Savannah captured a ghost child

programme.title: The Proof Is Out There
programme.desc: Tony Harris separates the real from the fake in some of the most compelling Bigfoot evidence recently captured. Footprint casts from Mount St Helens may be proof that a massive, undiscovered primate lives in North America

programme.desc: Documentary series exploring anomalies appearing on satellite images to try and get a better understanding of unexplained phenomena

programme.title: Historys Greatest Mysteries

programme.desc: Adolf Hitler began gradually changing a peaceful German people into a merciless war machine after capturing power in 1933. Now, specialists study the inventive tactics employed by the Nazis to indoctrinate and control the will of its citizens. Narrated by Jamie Theakston

programme.desc: Documentary drawing on archaeological excavations, expert commentary, 3D animation and historical reconstructions to delve into the mysteries, myths and arcane history of the Celts. It reveals brand new information about the ancient civilization. The first of three programmes explores some of the mysteries of how the early Celts emerged and expanded, from collapsed salt mines, to bizarre rituals and lost cities

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner
programme.desc: Even after centuries of study, the human mind remains as inscrutable as ever. programme.title: Paranormal: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Documentary the most chilling and unexplainable paranormal activity footage captured by eyewitnesses

programme.title: The UnXplained with William Shatner

programme.title: Benedetta (2021)
programme.desc: Benedetta Carlini arrives at the Convent of the Mother of God in Pescia, northern Italy as a child. In adulthood, she experiences powerful visions of Jesus, and her proclamations draw crowds to the convent. However, Benedettas faith is tested by the arrival of a young woman called Bartolomea, who arouses forbidden lust. Historical drama, starring Virginie Efira, Charlotte Rampling and Lambert Wilson. In French

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Joe Lycett and comedian Jessica Fostekew head to Lanzarote, known as the island of a thousand volcanoes. The duo hire a trike to discover the lunar landscape and sample volcanic wine in the surreal and surprisingly fertile region of La Geria, before stopping off for a traditional meal of limpets and bienmesabe. They then visit the Jameos del Agua, a partially collapsed lava tube that houses a restaurant, concert hall and crystalline lagoon, home to a tiny blind albino crab found nowhere else in the world. Then its on to Puerto Calero for a submarine safari and a trip to the Jardin de Cactus, which incorporates a cafe serving cactus croquettes

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

The guests get competitive in a round of clay shooting, and debate whether they believe in the existence of ghosts

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Cranleigh House BandB in Combe Martin, Devon, where former couple Katherine Armitage and Stewart Johnston offer alternative accommodation for those who enjoy yoga and are seeking spiritual enlightenment. They hope the group will send out energy for world peace and healing, but Mike and Denise question whether the whole thing is a joke

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Mike and Denise Mitchell welcome the contestants to Beaches BandB in Paignton, Devon, which only opened for business a few weeks ago. programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners come together for one last time to discover what they have been paid, and the identity of the winner. Katherine and Stuart defend their vegetarian breakfast, and Mike and Denise deal with negative comments about their cereal selection

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: When Arthur has a fall, Doug installs a camera in the basement to keep a watchful eye on him - but Deacon, Spence and Danny become addicted to spying on the pensioner. Meanwhile, Carrie decides to buy life insurance, filling her husband with fear for the future. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: A slice of wedding cake triggers off memories of Carries uneasiness prior to her big day and a desperate search for reassurance from God about her marriage to Doug. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert contemplates leaving the police force to take up a job selling security systems, but the proposal receives a mixed reaction, leading to tense celebrations at his birthday party. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Brad Garrett and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is delighted to be awarded an honorary doctorate, but hurts Debras feelings by thanking everyone except her in his acceptance speech. He claims it was an accident, though she takes the opportunity to remind him of past snubs that were obviously deliberate

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles tries to settle a score with a plastic surgeon, only to find himself attracted to her, while Frasier is disappointed by the lack of achievements listed in his obituary when it is published prematurely

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Part one of two. A bout of crippling back pain prompts Frasier to begin taking strong medication - which dulls his senses and causes him to accidentally blurt out a long-held secret to Daphne. Comedy, with Kelsey Grammer and Jane Leeves

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer enters Lisa in a beauty pageant to boost her self-esteem, and has the satisfaction of seeing her crowned runner-up - but she finds her principles heavily compromised as a result. Featuring the voice of Bob Hope

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart misbehaves once too often, prompting Homer and Marge to impose a terrible punishment - banning him from ever going to see the new feature-length Itchy and Scratchy film, and standing firm despite his constant pleas

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge takes a job at the power plant to help with the cost of repairing the family home, which is sliding off its foundations. With the voice of Tom Jones

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart develops a crush on babysitter Laura Powers and plots to break up her relationship with bullying boyfriend Jimbo Jones - but things do not turn out as planned. Featuring the voice of Sara Gilbert (Roseanne, The Big Bang Theory)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest begins at The Peniarth Arms in Bryncrug, where host Susanne Fox is joined by her best friend and colleague Anwen Roberts, but a revelation raises some eyebrows

programme.title: Four in a Bed
