programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A swindler buys a painting from a sweet old lady, but gets less than he bargained for. Drama, starring Bill Maynard and Jesse Matthews

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A man is shot in a locked room with only one other person in it - but there is no sign of a gun

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: When an acid-tongued gossip columnist lets fly with another barrage of witty one-liners, his victims want revenge. Luckily, a pair of young actors are on hand to teach him a lesson

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: An actor threatened by Satan worshippers agrees to star in a new film so long as no one knows where he goes upon leaving the studio each day. Drama, starring Christopher Lee and Gia Scala

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A man discovers that his business partner has fraudulently embezzled at least $60,000 from their company, and warns him that if he does not repay the money promptly, criminal charges will be pressed that should result in a lengthy prison sentence. However, his crooked former friend already plans to fake his death and escape with the cash. Drama, starring Richard Anderson, Steven Hill and Joanna Moore

programme.title: Oh! What a Lovely War (1969)
programme.desc: First World War musical, comprising a series of satirical sketches highlighting the futility of conflict from the perspective of the ordinary soldiers - many from the same family - and covering famous historical moments, including the Christmas truce. Richard Attenboroughs directorial debut, starring Ralph Richardson, Laurence Olivier, John Mills and John Gielgud

programme.title: California Dreamin: The Songs of the Mamas and the Papas
programme.desc: Documentary charting the success of the Californian pop group, featuring performance, archive footage and interviews with the band members. Denny Doherty, Cass Elliot, John Phillips and Michelle Phillips provide accounts of the writing and recording process involved in the creation of their hit songs and how they personally dealt with instant fame and success

programme.title: Agatha Christies Pale Horse
programme.desc: A sculptor discovers a dying priest who gives him a list of names. Investigations lead the man to the Pale Horse coaching inn, the home of three modern-day witches - who may be using their occult skills to murder the people on the list by auto suggestion. Mystery, starring Colin Buchanan, Jayne Ashbourne and Hermione Norris

programme.title: Bee Gees: One Night Only
programme.desc: Barry, Robin and Maurice Gibb perform their greatest hits, such as Jive Talkin, How Deep Is Your Love and Stayin Alive, in a concert at the MGM Grand, Las Vegas, in 1997. They are joined by Celine Dion on the track Immortality, and also sing some of the music they wrote but which was made popular by other artists, including Islands in the Stream, Guilty and Heartbreaker

programme.title: The Good, the Bad and the Ugly (1966)
programme.desc: A laconic gunslinger, a ruthless hired killer and a conniving outlaw hunt for a cache of loot during the chaos of the American Civil War. However, each is privy to only part of the information necessary to find it, setting in motion a series of deadly betrayals. The third film in Sergio Leones Spaghetti Western trilogy, starring Clint Eastwood as the Man with No Name, with Lee Van Cleef and Eli Wallach. Featuring Ennio Morricones iconic soundtrack

programme.title: Angelheaded Hipster: The Songs of Marc Bolan and T. Rex
programme.desc: Documentary celebrating the band and their frontman, featuring archival performances as well as interviews with Bolan himself as well as Elton John and Ringo Starr. There are also films of musical interpretations by artists including Nick Cave, John Cameron Mitchell, Joan Jett, Macy Gray, U2, Lucinda Williams, Father John Misty, and Bolans son Rolan

programme.title: Greatest Albums Live
programme.desc: Accompanied by the Southbank Sinfonia at the London Palladium, pop band ABC perform and discuss The Lexicon of Love, one of the 1980s most successful debut albums

programme.title: Discovering Music
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the life and career of musician and actor David Bowie, who returned to the top of the charts in 2013 with The Next Day, his first album in a decade. Music critics and DJs offer their thoughts on the London-born artists colourful career and enduring success

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.desc: Phil Collins gives a candid insight into the making of his first solo album Face Value in 1979, revealing how a painful divorce from his first wife provided the inspiration for smash hit In the Air Tonight. Most of the tracks were improvised, and Phil recalls a jam session with Eric Clapton, who contributed to the song The Roof Is Leaking

programme.title: Mozarts Sister
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the story of Maria-Anna Mozart, who shared equal billing with her brother until she was 16, then forced to withdraw from public life because she was a woman

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.sub-title: A Girl Cant Always Have Everything
programme.desc: A selfish actress used to having her own way asks her friend for help - but may be expecting too much after catching the eye of a rich, elderly widower. Joan Collins and Pauline Collins star

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A crooked antiques dealer masquerading as a clergyman encounters a farmer - who gives him a piece of furniture worth a fortune. Starring John Gielgud and Bernard Miles

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A scorned husband seeks revenge on his wife and her lover - but is not certain who the man is. Starring Denholm Elliott and Joss Ackland

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A womans eye transplant leads her lover to see her in a new light. Starring Amanda Redman and Anthony Valentine

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A man takes revenge for being left out of the Christmas celebrations at his office party. Starring Robert Morley, with Amanda Redman

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A married man finds his beautiful mistress murdered and flees without reporting the crime and soon becomes the victim of a blackmailer. Dark drama, starring Patrick ONeal and Kathie Brown

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: An ethical lawyer becomes very disturbed about what to do when the client he just got acquitted of murder brags that he committed the crime. Drama, starring Martin Landau and Frank Gorshin

programme.title: Beyond the Brush
programme.desc: Siân Walters and James Payne explore the story behind Francisco Goyas Saturn Devouring His Son, revealing a dark imagination, turbulent times and haunting visions of human nature

programme.title: Beyond the Brush
programme.desc: Siân Walters and James Payne explore the story behind Hieronymus Boschs The Garden of Earthly Delights, reveaing a vivid imagination, intricate symbolism and a daring vision of Heaven, Earth and Hell

programme.title: The Stranger (1946)
programme.desc: A Nazi war criminal masquerades as a college professor in an American town, while a government official is intent on tracking him down. Drama, directed by and starring Orson Welles, with Loretta Young and Edward G Robinson

programme.title: Simon and Garfunkel: Old Friends - Live on Stage
programme.desc: A 2003 concert by the duo at Madison Square Garden in New York City, featuring a guest appearance by the Everly Brothers

programme.title: Paul Simon: In Restless Dreams
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary exploring the 60-year career of the singer-songwriter, from his partnership with Art Garfunkel to the global success of his 1986 LP Graceland, as he returns to the studio to record his 2023 album Seven Psalms

programme.title: Cliff Richard and the Shadows: The Final Reunion
programme.desc: A 2009 concert at Londons O2 Arena during their 50th anniversary tour, with performances of songs including Living Doll, Move It and Apache

programme.title: Opry Live
programme.sub-title: Carly Pearce, Ashley McBryde, Martina McBride, Crystal Gayle, Emmy Russell, Rhonda Vincent
programme.desc: Featuring performances by Carly Pearce, Ashley McBryde, Martina McBride, Crystal Gayle, Emmy Russell and Rhonda Vincent

programme.title: Isle of Wight Festival 2025
programme.desc: Coverage of veteran Manchester indie band Jamess headline set in the Big Top at Seaclose Park, Newport

programme.title: Mozart: Genius for Hire
programme.desc: The story of how the composer broke free from the constraints of court employment to embrace a risky life as Viennas pioneering freelancer, defying tradition to compose, teach and perform on his own terms. The tale is told through letters between Mozart and his father Leopold, read by Matthew Broome and David Harewood

programme.title: Hired Gun
programme.desc: Documentary about session and touring musicians who are hired by well-established bands and artists including Metallica, Kiss and Billy Joel

programme.title: Greatest Albums Live
programme.desc: Simple Minds perform their breakthrough 1982 album New Gold Dream at Paisley Abbey, including the hit Promised You a Miracle

programme.title: Classic Albums
programme.desc: The making of the Doors eponymous debut album is discussed by Robbie Krieger, John Densmore and Ray Manzarek. They also talk about why singer Jim Morrisons lyrics continue to inspire fans around the world and the programme features performances of songs including Light My Fire and The End

programme.title: LSO: Rattle Conducts Brahms and Shostakovich
programme.desc: A performance by the London Symphony Orchestra

programme.title: Watercolour Challenge
programme.desc: Hannah Gordon hosts the art competition in which amateur watercolour painters compete against the clock and each other to capture a scene in just four hours

programme.title: Watercolour Challenge
programme.desc: Hannah Gordon hosts the art competition in which amateur watercolour painters compete against the clock and each other to capture a scene in just four hours

programme.title: Tales of the Unexpected
programme.desc: A crooked antiques dealer masquerading as a clergyman encounters a farmer - who gives him a piece of furniture worth a fortune. Starring John Gielgud and Bernard Miles

programme.title: The Time Travelers Wife
programme.desc: Henry finally has a chance to step inside Clares home and meet her family. Meanwhile, Henry and Gomez flounder on their path to friendship. Starring Rose Leslie

programme.title: The Time Travelers Wife
programme.desc: As their wedding day nears, a stressed Henry begins to travel more than ever. Meanwhile, the future Clare envisioned with Henry slips out of reach

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: As Kendall, Shiv and Roman hone their pitch for investors in Los Angeles, Logan learns of a rival bid. Drama, starring Brian Cox and Jeremy Strong

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: While Kendall, Shiv and Roman consider an aggressive move regarding the Matsson deal, Connor tries to make the most of his wedding rehearsal dinner

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: While Logan doles out an unsavoury task to Roman ahead of his trip to meet Matsson, Connor fixates on small details at his wedding.

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Documentary following stately home owners who hire out their estates to earn extra income, and the clients who pay to use their properties for functions including stag parties, weddings and hunting trips. The programme explores how the reality of life in Britains grand houses is often less glamorous than it appears, as proprietors struggle to maintain crumbling buildings and pay utility bills, and examines the modern-day divide between domestic staff and their employers. Featuring life at Chillingham Castle, Maunsel House, Carlton Towers and Muncaster Castle

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: At Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, Sir Humphrey Wakefield prepares to hand over the estate to his apprehensive son Maximilian. Hard-working staff at Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire get ready for the arrival of 120 caravan owners for the annual rally and dinner dance

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to Tokyo and checks out the Park Hyatt, the hotel featured in the film Lost in Translation, and goes behind the closed doors of the Japanese capitals love hotels. In the fashionable district of Meguro, Richard takes in the Claska, which was the citys first boutique hotel and has its own canine beauty salon

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: Richard E Grant travels to Venice, said to be the city with the highest concentration of luxury hotels on the planet. He discovers how a measuring error led to the building of the citys biggest swimming pool, tries out a 15,000 euro-a-night royal suite whose bed has been slept in by everyone from the Beckhams to Prince Charles and the Duchess of Cornwall, and visits a hotel that keeps its doors open even when water floods to knee height. He also finds out why breaking a window once earned Ernest Hemingway a 10 per cent discount on his room

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: King Viserys Targaryen hosts a tournament to celebrate the impending birth of his second child, while his daughter Rhaenyra welcomes her Uncle Daemon back to the Red Keep. First episode of the Game of Thrones prequel, starring Paddy Considine and Matt Smith

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra oversteps at the Small Council, while Viserys is urged to secure the succession through a new marriage and Daemon announces his intentions

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Daemon and the Sea Snake battle the Crabfeeder, while the realm celebrates Aegons second nameday and Rhaenyra faces the prospect of marriage. Paddy Considine and Matt Smith star

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra continues her search for a suitable match, while Daemon returns to Kings Landing and stirs more trouble for the king. Rhaenyra learns a valuable lesson

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Daemon visits his wife in the Vale, while Viserys and Rhaenyra broker agreements with the Velaryons, and Alicent seeks the truth about the princess

programme.title: House of the Dragon

programme.title: House of the Dragon

programme.title: I Hate Suzie

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: The Waystar team heads to Norway to meet Matsson and his staff, while Shiv, Kendall and Roman consider whether to fight for Logans original deal

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming examines the hidden histories of cities, revealing the sights and sounds rarely witnessed by the public. He begins in London at St Pauls Cathedral, where he visits a place tourists never go, before exploring a hidden park and a little-known church. He also gets a guided tour of Soho from broadcaster Danny Baker

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming tours the less-celebrated sights of Brighton, beginning by visiting the Toy and Model Museum to look at its collection of model trains. He then discovers a boutique that sells a variety of unusual items, before taking a glimpse behind the scenes at the Royal Pavilion

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores the history of Bristol, beginning by learning a grisly secret at the docks before meeting Mercury Prize-winning musician Roni Size to discuss life in the St Pauls and Stokes Croft areas of the city. He also explores the district of Clifton and visits a speakeasy-style bar

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Documentary following stately home owners who hire out their estates to earn extra income, and the clients who pay to use their properties for functions including stag parties, weddings and hunting trips. The programme explores how the reality of life in Britains grand houses is often less glamorous than it appears, as proprietors struggle to maintain crumbling buildings and pay utility bills, and examines the modern-day divide between domestic staff and their employers. Featuring life at Chillingham Castle, Maunsel House, Carlton Towers and Muncaster Castle

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: After overthrowing her husband and having his successor jailed and eventually murdered, Russian empress Catherine II will stop at nothing to keep her position. She sees her own son as a threat to her and refuses to marry the man who helped her to power for fear he will share the crown. Historical drama following the German-born empress of Russia towards the end of her reign. Starring Helen Mirren and Jason Clarke

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: Potemkin returns and hopes to begin a relationship with Catherine, only to discover she has fallen for Lieutenant Vasilchikov. Meanwhile, Prince Paul becomes increasingly frustrated at the perceived refusal of his succession

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: Catherine struggles to deal with Potemkins moods and jealousy and tragedy strikes for Paul, forcing her to resort to extreme measures

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: In the final episode, Potemkin is forced to fight for Catherine and for Russia once again, and the exertion of war begins to take its toll on their relationship

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Rhaenyra struggles to come to terms with her sons murder, Alicent grows concerned by Aegons Small Council. Return of the fantasy drama set 200 years before the events of Game of Thrones and telling the story of House Targaryen. Starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra questions Daemons loyalty as Otto schemes to turn the public against her, while Ser Criston Cole concocts a misguided plan for revenge

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As ancient grudges resurface, Rhaenys suggests that Alicent may see reason while the men around her seek bloodshed. Ser Criston proposes a bold scheme, while Daemon arrives at Harrenhal to raise an army for the Blacks

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.sub-title: The Red Dragon and the Gold
programme.desc: In Rhaenyras absence and with no word from Daemon at Harrenhal, Rhaenys tries to keep the peace on the Black Council as Cole mounts a campaign into the Crownlands. In Kings Landing, Aemond continues to undermine Aegons fragile hold on authority. Fantasy drama, starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Amid whispers of bad omens, the Greens consider how to fill a void on Aegons council, while Jacaerys sets out on a rogue mission to strike a deal. Daemon enlists Lord Willem Blackwood to help persuade the Brackens to bend the knee

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: With few options left, Rhaenyra summons a trusted knight for a risky venture and plots with Mysaria to catalyse the smallfolk. Meanwhile, Daemons unease grows, and Aemond takes steps to reshape the Green Council

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Rhaenyra looks to gain an advantage by unusual means, Daemon puts pressure on Oscar Tully to raise up his bannermen

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Aemond becomes more volatile, Larys plots an escape and Rhaenyra looks to press home her advantage. Fantasy drama, starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Alcaras struggles to balance work and home life and must make a choice when he is tempted by an offer that goes against his morals

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.sub-title: Missouri Mutual Life and Health Insurance Company
programme.desc: Eager to please, Clark ramps up his support for Floyds health and financial wellness, while Carol makes her lover swear to secrecy

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: In the town of Ennis, Alaska, the eight men working at the Tsalal Arctic Research Station all disappear. Local police chief Liz Danvers leads the investigation, but state trooper Evangeline Navarro believes it may be linked to an unsolved murder. The return of the crime anthology, starring Jodie Foster and Kali Reis

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: While Hank leads the search for Clark, Prior asks Danvers about the murder-suicide case that drove a wedge between her and Navarro. After sifting through the contents of Clarks trailer, Navarro and Danvers seek out a local hairdresser for insight on Annie, which leads to a tip about another former Tsalal worker. Later, tensions grow between Danvers and her stepdaughter Leah

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: As Danvers and Prior set out to learn more about Tsalal - and find an unlikely location for the physical evidence - Captain Connelly threatens to hand the case over to Anchorage. Later, Navarro and Danvers separately find a connection between one of the Tsalal men and Annie, prompting the former partners to agree to work the case together

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor returns to explore more of the worlds most luxurious hotels and begins in Miamis South Beach, home to some of the most hedonistic and extravagant establishments in America. At the Fontainebleau, he meets a man with eye-opening stories about Frank Sinatras regular visits and gets a shock when he discovers how much it costs to hire a booth in the night club. Richard also gatecrashes swimwear fashion week at the Raleigh Hotel, where he speaks to the event manager about the many celebrity parties he has organised

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: Floyd confronts Clark about the affair, while Plumb and Homer uncover new information about Carols past. Black comedy, starring David Harbour, Jason Bateman and Linda Cardellini

programme.desc: Alan Cumming explores the history of Bristol, beginning by learning a grisly secret at the docks before meeting Mercury Prize-winning musician Roni Size to discuss life in the St Pauls and Stokes Croft areas of the city. He also explores the district of Clifton and visits a speakeasy-style bar

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: Documentary following stately home owners who hire out their estates to earn extra income, and the clients who pay to use their properties for functions including stag parties, weddings and hunting trips. The programme explores how the reality of life in Britains grand houses is often less glamorous than it appears, as proprietors struggle to maintain crumbling buildings and pay utility bills, and examines the modern-day divide between domestic staff and their employers. Featuring life at Chillingham Castle, Maunsel House, Carlton Towers and Muncaster Castle

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: After overthrowing her husband and having his successor jailed and eventually murdered, Russian empress Catherine II will stop at nothing to keep her position. She sees her own son as a threat to her and refuses to marry the man who helped her to power for fear he will share the crown. Historical drama following the German-born empress of Russia towards the end of her reign. Starring Helen Mirren and Jason Clarke

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: Potemkin returns and hopes to begin a relationship with Catherine, only to discover she has fallen for Lieutenant Vasilchikov. Meanwhile, Prince Paul becomes increasingly frustrated at the perceived refusal of his succession

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: Catherine struggles to deal with Potemkins moods and jealousy and tragedy strikes for Paul, forcing her to resort to extreme measures

programme.title: Catherine the Great
programme.desc: In the final episode, Potemkin is forced to fight for Catherine and for Russia once again, and the exertion of war begins to take its toll on their relationship

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Rhaenyra struggles to come to terms with her sons murder, Alicent grows concerned by Aegons Small Council. Return of the fantasy drama set 200 years before the events of Game of Thrones and telling the story of House Targaryen. Starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Rhaenyra questions Daemons loyalty as Otto schemes to turn the public against her, while Ser Criston Cole concocts a misguided plan for revenge

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As ancient grudges resurface, Rhaenys suggests that Alicent may see reason while the men around her seek bloodshed. Ser Criston proposes a bold scheme, while Daemon arrives at Harrenhal to raise an army for the Blacks

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.sub-title: The Red Dragon and the Gold
programme.desc: In Rhaenyras absence and with no word from Daemon at Harrenhal, Rhaenys tries to keep the peace on the Black Council as Cole mounts a campaign into the Crownlands. In Kings Landing, Aemond continues to undermine Aegons fragile hold on authority. Fantasy drama, starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: Amid whispers of bad omens, the Greens consider how to fill a void on Aegons council, while Jacaerys sets out on a rogue mission to strike a deal. Daemon enlists Lord Willem Blackwood to help persuade the Brackens to bend the knee

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: With few options left, Rhaenyra summons a trusted knight for a risky venture and plots with Mysaria to catalyse the smallfolk. Meanwhile, Daemons unease grows, and Aemond takes steps to reshape the Green Council

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Rhaenyra looks to gain an advantage by unusual means, Daemon puts pressure on Oscar Tully to raise up his bannermen

programme.title: House of the Dragon
programme.desc: As Aemond becomes more volatile, Larys plots an escape and Rhaenyra looks to press home her advantage. Fantasy drama, starring Matt Smith and Emma DArcy

programme.title: All Her Fault
programme.desc: Alcaras struggles to balance work and home life and must make a choice when he is tempted by an offer that goes against his morals

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.sub-title: Missouri Mutual Life and Health Insurance Company
programme.desc: Eager to please, Clark ramps up his support for Floyds health and financial wellness, while Carol makes her lover swear to secrecy

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: In the town of Ennis, Alaska, the eight men working at the Tsalal Arctic Research Station all disappear. Local police chief Liz Danvers leads the investigation, but state trooper Evangeline Navarro believes it may be linked to an unsolved murder. The return of the crime anthology, starring Jodie Foster and Kali Reis

programme.title: True Detective
programme.desc: When Julias mental-health struggles resurface, Navarro takes her to a local facility, promising that this time will be better. Later, Danvers and Navarro confirm the location of Annies murder, while the police chief levies a harsh punishment on Leah following her stepdaughters act of protest

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor returns to explore more of the worlds most luxurious hotels and begins in Miamis South Beach, home to some of the most hedonistic and extravagant establishments in America. At the Fontainebleau, he meets a man with eye-opening stories about Frank Sinatras regular visits and gets a shock when he discovers how much it costs to hire a booth in the night club. Richard also gatecrashes swimwear fashion week at the Raleigh Hotel, where he speaks to the event manager about the many celebrity parties he has organised

programme.title: DTF St Louis
programme.desc: Floyd confronts Clark about the affair, while Plumb and Homer uncover new information about Carols past. Black comedy, starring David Harbour, Jason Bateman and Linda Cardellini

programme.title: Succession
programme.desc: Shiv weighs a proposal from Matsson ahead of Waystars Investor Day, while Kendall and Roman try to match Logans leadership style

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming examines the hidden histories of cities, revealing the sights and sounds rarely witnessed by the public. He begins in London at St Pauls Cathedral, where he visits a place tourists never go, before exploring a hidden park and a little-known church. He also gets a guided tour of Soho from broadcaster Danny Baker

programme.title: Urban Secrets
programme.desc: Alan Cumming tours the less-celebrated sights of Brighton, beginning by visiting the Toy and Model Museum to look at its collection of model trains. He then discovers a boutique that sells a variety of unusual items, before taking a glimpse behind the scenes at the Royal Pavilion

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor returns to explore more of the worlds most luxurious hotels and begins in Miamis South Beach, home to some of the most hedonistic and extravagant establishments in America. At the Fontainebleau, he meets a man with eye-opening stories about Frank Sinatras regular visits and gets a shock when he discovers how much it costs to hire a booth in the night club. Richard also gatecrashes swimwear fashion week at the Raleigh Hotel, where he speaks to the event manager about the many celebrity parties he has organised

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: Richard E Grant travels to Venice, said to be the city with the highest concentration of luxury hotels on the planet. He discovers how a measuring error led to the building of the citys biggest swimming pool, tries out a 15,000 euro-a-night royal suite whose bed has been slept in by everyone from the Beckhams to Prince Charles and the Duchess of Cornwall, and visits a hotel that keeps its doors open even when water floods to knee height. He also finds out why breaking a window once earned Ernest Hemingway a 10 per cent discount on his room

programme.title: Task
programme.desc: After scaling back his role in the FBI and still reeling from a family tragedy, Special Agent Tom Brandis reluctantly returns to the field to head a new, relatively inexperienced team to investigate a string of robberies in Philadelphia. Following his brothers death, Robbie Prendergrast earns extra cash for his family by ripping off drug dealers - but a bad tip upends his delicate balance. Crime drama, starring Mark Ruffalo

programme.title: Task
programme.desc: As he prepares for an emotional court appearance, Tom buries himself in the case, while Emily questions her obligations to the family. Maeve makes a critical choice to protect her own loved ones, while Robbie works to find a way to turn his newfound surplus into cash

programme.title: Transformers One (2024)
programme.desc: Years before the sentient robots became arch enemies, Optimus Prime and Megatron were friends on their home planet of Cybertron. However, their feud changes the universe forever. Animated sci-fi adventure, with the voices of Chris Hemsworth, Brian Tyree Henry, Scarlett Johansson and Keegan-Michael Key

programme.title: Bumblebee (2018)
programme.desc: In 1987, lonely Californian teenager Charlie Watson is traumatised by the death of her father and resentful of her mother Sallys relationship with new boyfriend Ronald. For her 18th-birthday shes given a yellow Volkswagen Beetle, which turns out to be the battle-scarred Autobot Bumblebee. Transformers prequel, starring Hailee Steinfeld, John Cena and Jorge Lendeborg Jr

programme.title: Transformers (2007)
programme.desc: Teenager Sam Witwicky is treated to his first car by his dad, but it turns out to be an alien scout with a life of its own. Before long, the vehicle embroils Sam in a long-running intergalactic war between two factions of giant shape-changing robots, which have come to Earth to find a mystical cube that grants infinite power to its possessor. Michael Bays sci-fi action adventure, inspired by the toy franchise, with Shia LaBeouf, Megan Fox, Josh Duhamel, Jon Voight and John Turturro

programme.title: Transformers: Revenge of the Fallen (2009)
programme.desc: The war between the shape-shifting robots erupts once again, as the first of the evil Decepticons leads an attack on Earth to locate an ancient planet-destroying machine. Hapless teenager Sam Witwicky is caught in the middle of the ensuing conflict as he holds the key to discovering the location of the device. Sci-fi adventure sequel, starring Shia LaBeouf and Megan Fox

programme.title: Transformers: Dark of the Moon (2011)
programme.desc: The heroic autobots discover that a spaceship from their own planet crashed into the moon decades ago, carrying their former leader and an incredibly powerful device. They must fight to defend the human race as their enemies the decepticons plot to use this machine to rebuild their own world and destroy the Earth. Sci-fi adventure sequel, with Shia LaBeouf, Josh Duhamel and Rosie Huntington-Whiteley

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction (2014)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots are driven into hiding when the human race turns against them. When rediscovered by a kindly inventor and his daughter, they come out of exile to save the world, battling a new breed of human-created Transformers. These deadly new machines were created to hunt them down, but are now growing independent and intend to make use of technology from the Transformers home planet in a plot that could threaten all life on Earth. Fourth film in the sci-fi adventure series, starring Mark Wahlberg, Stanley Tucci and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Transformers One (2024)
programme.desc: Years before the sentient robots became arch enemies, Optimus Prime and Megatron were friends on their home planet of Cybertron. However, their feud changes the universe forever. Animated sci-fi adventure, with the voices of Chris Hemsworth, Brian Tyree Henry, Scarlett Johansson and Keegan-Michael Key

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Superman is assisted by the Justice Gang, comprising Guy Gardner, aka Green Lantern, Kendra Saunders, aka Hawkgirl, Michael Holt, aka Mister Terrific and Rex Mason, aka Metamorpho. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: A Minecraft Movie (2025)
programme.desc: Four misfits are yanked through a strange portal into a cubic realm powered by imagination. To return home, they must learn its rules and journey alongside an unlikely master crafter. Director Jared Hesss blockbusting fantasy adventure based on the hit videogame, starring Jack Black, Jason Momoa, Emma Myers and Jennifer Coolidge

programme.title: Uncharted (2022)
programme.desc: A pair of treasure hunters embark on a globetrotting search for a fortune that was lost 500 years previously, in a race against time against a ruthless rival who claims to be the rightful owner. The quest for fortune and glory sets the younger of the duo on a search for his missing brother. Action adventure, starring Tom Holland, Mark Wahlberg and Antonio Banderas

programme.title: Spy Kids (2001)
programme.desc: A megalomaniac threatens to take over the world, so two married spies come out of retirement to thwart his plans. However, when they go missing, it is up to their plucky children to step in and save the day. Family adventure directed by Robert Rodriguez, starring Antonio Banderas, Carla Gugino, Alan Cumming, Alexa Vega and Daryl Sabara

programme.title: Spy Kids 2: Island of Lost Dreams (2002)
programme.desc: The pint-sized secret agents investigate a mad scientist who has meddled with powerful forces and created a host of bizarre mutant animals. However, the villain is not the only problem they have to face, as another pair of youngsters are determined to outshine them. Family adventure sequel, starring Antonio Banderas, Steve Buscemi and Carla Gugino

programme.title: Spy Kids 3-D: Game Over (2003)
programme.desc: Young agent Juni has to go it alone when his big sister Carmen is kidnapped by the evil Toymaker, forcing the plucky junior spy to infiltrate the villains virtual reality world to rescue her. Adventure sequel, starring Daryl Sabara, Alexa Vega, Sylvester Stallone, Antonio Banderas, Ricardo Montalban, George Clooney, Steve Buscemi, Salma Hayek and Elijah Wood

programme.title: Batman Unlimited: Mechs vs Mutants (2016)
programme.desc: The Dark Knight battles old enemies who have been transformed into giant monsters. Animated superhero adventure, with the voices of Roger Craig Smith and Oded Fehr

programme.title: Journey 2: The Mysterious Island (2012)
programme.desc: A teenager picks up a distress signal originating from the middle of the ocean. Joining an expedition to track the signal to its source, he discovers an unexplored island inhabited by strange creatures, and searches for a way to rescue its sole human inhabitant. Fantasy adventure sequel to Journey to the Centre of the Earth, starring Dwayne Johnson, Michael Caine and Josh Hutcherson

programme.title: Bookworm (2024)
programme.desc: Mildred, an 11-year-old girl, finds her world turned upside down when her estranged father, a washed-up magician, takes her on a wild adventure. Family comedy, starring Elijah Wood and Nell Fisher

programme.title: Men in Black II (2002)
programme.desc: Agent J investigates the unauthorised landing of a spacecraft and discovers a malevolent alien disguised as a lingerie model is on the verge of destroying humanity. His only hope of stopping her diabolical plot is to restore the memory of his retired partner K - but his former mentor takes more than a little convincing. Sci-fi comedy sequel, directed by Barry Sonnenfeld, starring Will Smith, Tommy Lee Jones, Rosario Dawson, Lara Flynn Boyle, Johnny Knoxville, Rip Torn and Tony Shalhoub

programme.title: Men in Black 3 (2012)
programme.desc: An alien criminal escapes from a prison on the moon and goes back in time on a mission of revenge, changing the course of history. Agent J of the top-secret Earth defence organisation follows him back to 1969, and joins forces with a younger version of his mentor Agent K to set things right. Sci-fi comedy sequel, starring Will Smith, Josh Brolin and Tommy Lee Jones

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Director Jared Hesss blockbusting fantasy adventure based on the hit videogame, starring Jack Black, Jason Momoa, Emma Myers and Jennifer Coolidge

programme.title: Pokemon: Detective Pikachu (2019)
programme.desc: Student Tim Goodman sets out to find his missing detective father by teaming up with a wise-cracking talking Pikachu that his dad, Harry, used to own. With help from reporter Lucy and her Psyduck, they attempt to track him down before time runs out. Fantasy adventure, starring Justice Smith and the voice of Ryan Reynolds, with Kathryn Newton, Ken Watanabe and Bill Nighy

Fantasy adventure, starring Justice Smith and the voice of Ryan Reynolds, with Kathryn Newton, Ken Watanabe and Bill Nighy

programme.title: E.T.: The Extra-Terrestrial (1982)
programme.desc: A lonely boy befriends an alien who has been left stranded on Earth. The two develop a psychic connection as the boy helps the extraterrestrial to contact his own people and call for rescue. However, living on Earth starts to have a devastating effect on the visitors health, and a government operative is determined to capture him for study. Steven Spielbergs sci-fi fantasy, starring Henry Thomas, Drew Barrymore, Dee Wallace and Peter Coyote

programme.title: Spy Kids 3-D: Game Over (2003)
programme.desc: Young agent Juni has to go it alone when his big sister Carmen is kidnapped by the evil Toymaker, forcing the plucky junior spy to infiltrate the villains virtual reality world to rescue her. programme.title: Coyotes (2025)
programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen

programme.title: Adulthood (2025)
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed

programme.title: Man Finds Tape (2025)
programme.desc: After finding mysterious video clips, siblings investigate the strange recordings and uncover a disturbing secret. Horror thriller, starring Kelsey Pribilski and William Magnuson

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: Hostages (2025)
programme.desc: After an explosion at a London hotel, three people are swept up in the chaos. As rumours circulate that the blast was a terrorist attack, their story gathers momentum on social media and across the rolling 24-hour news cycle. Writer/director Jim Owens comedy thriller, starring Charlotte Ritchie, Tanya Moodie and Nicholas Asbury

programme.title: Nobody 2 (2025)
programme.desc: Former assassin Hutch Mansell takes his family on a much-needed holiday, but soon finds himself in the crosshairs of a bloodthirsty crime boss. Comedy thriller, starring Bob Odenkirk, Connie Nielsen and Christopher Lloyd

programme.title: Superman (2025)
programme.desc: Kal-El, one of the last survivors of the planet Krypton, attempts to protect the people of Earth from evil genius Lex Luthor. Writer/director James Gunns fantasy adventure, starring David Corenswet, Rachel Brosnahan and Nicholas Hoult

programme.title: One Battle After Another (2025)
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, he scrambles to find her as both battle the consequences of their pasts. Paul Thomas Andersons Oscar-winning action thriller loosely based on Thomas Pynchons novel Vineland, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, an Academy Award-winning Sean Penn, and Benicio del Toro

programme.title: On Swift Horses (2025)
programme.desc: Mild-mannered war veteran Lee Walker plans a life of quiet domesticity in California with his wife Muriel and younger brother Julius. Restless after an early discharge from the US Army, Julius steals money from Lee to seek his fortune in Nevada, where he lands a job in security at a casino and sparks forbidden desire with co-worker Henry, which is consummated away from prying eyes. Back in their hotel room, Julius and Henry fantasise about using the same underhand tactics as card sharps to line their pockets. Drama, starring Daisy Edgar-Jones, Jacob Elordi and Will Poulter

programme.desc: Willies dream of fighting crime with his cop dad is shattered when his baby brother Charlie arrives. And the new family member turns out to have superpowers. Family animation, with the voices of Karen Ardiff and Alex Kelly

programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

programme.title: Sketch (2025)
programme.desc: When a young girls sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worleys fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and DArcy Carden

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)

programme.title: Caught Red Handed
programme.desc: A burglar trying to steal laptops is caught out, while a Scottish corner shop owner is the victim of an armed robbery, and his daughter fears for his life. With Dominic Littlewood

programme.title: Terry Venables: A Man Can Dream
programme.desc: A look at the life and times of the football player-turned-manager, who died in November 2023, intertwined with the story of Englands unforgettable run at Euro 96, with insight from players, friends and family

programme.title: QPR: The Four Year Plan
programme.desc: An insight into the running of Queens Park Rangers football club, as cameras were given unprecedented access to the boardroom and the first team. In 2007, the club was facing relegation from the Championship as well as financial ruin, before being bought by F1 supremo Bernie Ecclestone and Italian businessman Flavio Briatore. Soon after, they were joined on the board by Indian steel magnate Lakshmi Mittal, and together the new owners promised a return to glory for the club and its supporters

programme.title: Adam Hills: Foot Fault
programme.desc: The comedian and host of The Last Leg takes viewers behind the scenes of a global campaign to promote para-standing tennis and its potential as a future Grand Slam and Paralympic event. Adam meets and plays with former Grand Slam winners and uncovers the barriers faced by aspiring tennis players with disabilities who want to be included by their sport at the highest level

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A profile of the American actress, who starred in When Harry Met Sally, Sleepless in Seattle, Youve Got Mail and Courage Under Fire

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A profile of the American actor, whose films include Thelma and Louise, Seven, Fight Club and 12 Monkeys, and won an Oscar for his role in Once Upon a Time in Hollywood

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: The life and career of the American actor, who won an Oscar for the screenplay of Good Will Hunting and starred in The Martian and the Bourne franchise

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: The life and work of director Christopher Nolan, whose films include Memento, Insomnia, the Dark Knight trilogy, The Prestige, Inception, Interstellar, Dunkirk and Tenet

programme.title: The Loneliest Whale: The Search for 52 (2021)
programme.desc: Documentary about the search to find a rare whale that calls out at a frequency unrecognised by other whales. This mysterious creature is believed to have lived its life in complete solitude, pointing to a greater awareness of human loneliness than ever before

programme.title: I Am Bruce Lee (2011)
programme.desc: The life and career of the actor and martial artist widely known for his work in Enter the Dragon and Fist of Fury, offering a perspective on his rise to fame

programme.title: Benetton Formula
programme.desc: The history of the Formula 1 team led by Alessandro Benetton, told through the memories of its key members and archive footage

programme.title: Hill
programme.desc: A profile of ex-Formula One driver Damon Hill, revealing how he overcame the adversity of losing his father Graham to follow in his footsteps and become world champion himself

programme.title: My Icon
programme.desc: The former England netball captain discusses the individuals that have inspired her during her life and career

programme.title: My Icon
programme.desc: The former sprint superstar and Olympic gold medalist discusses the individuals that have inspired him in his life and career

programme.title: Busby (2019)
programme.desc: A profile of former Manchester United manager Matt Busby, who transformed football through a career of great talent and tragedy. Featuring previously unseen archive footage and interviews with those who knew the man best

programme.title: Germanwings: What Happened on Flight 9525?
programme.desc: The circumstances surrounding the crash of an Airbus A320-211 in 2015, which killed 150 people and was found to have been deliberately caused by the co-pilot

programme.title: Bowling for Columbine (2002)
programme.desc: Michael Moores Oscar-winning documentary exploring Americas love affair with firearms. Going beyond public opinion, the film-maker examines corporate and political influence, visiting a bank where weapons are given to customers, as well as talking to Charlton Heston, one of the most famous proponents of every Americans right to bear arms

programme.title: Dave Not Coming Back (2020)
programme.desc: The story of two divers who embarked on a long and dangerous mission to retrieve a dead body from a freshwater cave in South Africa, with devastating consequences

programme.title: Forced Out (2023)
programme.desc: The stories of men and women dishonourably discharged from the Army, Navy and RAF because of their sexuality, with many imprisoned, having medals removed or losing their service pensions

programme.title: The Ibiza Affair: Uncovered
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the rise and fall of Heinz-Christian Strache and the role journalism plays in controlling those in power

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: The life and career of the Academy Award-winning actress famed for her performances in Fargo and more

programme.desc: The life and work of writer and film-maker Nora Ephron, who was nominated for Academy Awards for her screenplays for Silkwood, When Harry Met Sally and Sleepless in Seattle

programme.title: MoviePass, MovieCrash
programme.desc: The story of MoviePass, the company that offered cinema tickets at a discounted rate. It was a movie lovers dreaam, but in just eight years it went from being the fastest-growing subscription service since Spotify to total bankruptcy. This documentary chronicles the visionary mission of its co-founders, its early success and how it finally failed due to mismanagement and corporate greed

programme.title: Rise of the Superheroes
programme.desc: A look at how the tales of comic book superheroes like Batman and the Avengers were adapted for cinema before going on to dominate Hollywood and captivate audiences worldwide.

programme.title: Jackie Stewart
programme.desc: Documentary about Formula 1 great Jackie Stewart, from his humble beginnings outside Glasgow to winning three World Drivers Championships

programme.title: Everton: Howards Way (2019)
programme.desc: Documentary film telling the story of Everton and how they reached their their trophy-winning peak in the 1980s under the stewardship of Howard Kendall

programme.title: Lancaster (2022)
programme.desc: The story of the legendary bomber synonymous with the Dambusters, the night raids against Germany and the brave men and women who made them possible

programme.title: Bobby Robson: More Than a Manager (2018)
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the career of the much-loved former England, Barcelona and Newcastle United manager. programme.title: Blur: To the End

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: A bizarre trend happened in Ireland in the 1980s when thousands of people started seeing religious statues move. Some residents of a village reported seeing a statue of the Virgin Mary move. Others believed the phenomenon was just an optical illusion or a prank

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained

programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits archaeological digs around the country to discover what life was like during the Bronze and Iron ages before the Romans invaded. programme.title: Weird Britain
programme.desc: Andy McGrath embarks on a mission to unearth the Cornish sites of King Arthur and tries magnet fishing for the mythical sword Excalibur. Plus, a renowned psychic investigates a haunted jail and possessed house

programme.title: Weird Britain

programme.desc: Amid the chaos of D-Day, alarming wireless messages revealed Special Operations Executive (SOE) disloyalty. While concerns escalated, Allied troops advanced and Paris was liberated. SOE operations subsequently dwindled, prompting Second World War spymistress Vera Atkins to confront the harm done to her agents

programme.sub-title: The Quest for the Holy Grail

As the Third Reich rose to power, Himmler and the SS became fixated on the Grail, interpreting much of the myth surrounding it as fact - and the quest for it as attainable

programme.title: WWIIs Most Daring Raids

programme.title: Clash of the Gods

programme.title: Clash of the Gods

programme.title: Apocalypse D-Day
programme.desc: Part one of two. The story of the key turning point of the Second World War, which started on June 6, 1944. A titanic fleet took on the beaches of Normandy, intent on liberating Europe from Hitlers Nazis. Thanks to the lessons learned from the Dieppe raid of August 1942 and supported by the Provence landing of August 1944, the mission was a spectacular success as the Allies succeeded in moving beyond their political differences, overcoming logistical difficulties and carrying out an operation with unprecedented military stakes

programme.title: WWII Battles in Colour
programme.desc: The Battle of the Bulge, a major German offensive campaign on the Western Front during the Second World War, which took place in December 1944 and January 1945. programme.desc: God moves in mysterious ways and sometimes appears in mysterious places. This episode lools at claims of mysterious religious sightings. Why do so many people see a vision of Jesus Christ in seemingly normal sights such as a tree stump or an antique cabinet?

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained

In 1952, the radar at Andrews Airforce base and Washington National Airport picked up UFOs and two US Air Force F-94 jets streaked over Washington, searching for flying saucers. A week later, it happened again - more UFOs on the radar screen, more jets scrambled over Washington.

programme.title: Alien Files Reopened

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: People who make a living from bidding for the contents of abandoned storage units. programme.title: Storage Wars

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.sub-title: The Jenny, the Baker, the Prosthetics Maker

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Emilys husband, Cody, misses a bid and stirs up trouble. Brandi and Jarrod put their faith in the cowboy and end up facing their mortality. The Vegas Ladies struggle to be seen, while Ivy revisits some of his glory days

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Out in Hesperia, Marys transportation troubles lead to teaming up with Kenny and taking him out to pasture. Darrell shows the next generation of Gambler how its done, while the Vegas Ladies mid-century style lets them write their own ticket

programme.title: Witches of Essex
programme.desc: Henry VIIIs law against witches in 1542 led to thousands of women being persecuted and many burned at the stake. New investigative techniques and historical records are to re-examine the fates of women accused of witchcraft during 16th and 17th-century witch trials in Essex. Rylan and Alice Roberts explores the events, lives, and alleged crimes of those accused, often bringing the stories to life through scripted drama and featuring expert testimony from historians and psychologists

programme.title: Witches of Essex
programme.desc: St Osyth, a village near Brightlingsea in Essex, was home to 14 women who were put on trial for witchcraft, some of whom were duly convicted according to the law of the time. Rylan and Alice Roberts investigate the 1582 St Osyth witch hunt, where a petty disagreement over money spiralled into mass hysteria and death

programme.title: Witches of Essex
programme.desc: Rylan and Alice Roberts visit Manningtree, the focal point for the 1645 witch hunt where self-appointed Witchfinder General Matthew Hopkins orchestrated the persecution of many women accused of witchcraft. He terrorised those accused with brutal Puritan zeal and torture

programme.title: Britains X Files

programme.title: Great British Castle Rescue
programme.desc: Rick Edwards arrives at Lowther Castle, which was gutted by the 7th Earl of Lonsdale. Now, Jim Lowther, the 7th Earls son, is trying to save it

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Liners
programme.desc: The SS Cap Arcona, launched in 1927, was a large German ocean liner, later a ship of the German Navy, and finally a prison ship. During the Second World War it became the target of an RAF squadron attack

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Liners

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part documentary, the naturalist explores the origins of life on Earth. Beginning the journey near his childhood home in Charnwood Forest, Leicestershire, he learns how a fossil discovery transformed scientists understanding of the evolution of complex organisms, and in Newfoundland and Australia he reveals the earliest kinds of animal to exist on the planet. With the help of cutting-edge technology and visual effects, the programme brings the creatures to life, demonstrating how they survived

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: In the conclusion of the two-part documentary, the naturalist travels to Burgess Shale in Canadas Rocky Mountains, where he explores how evolution gained pace once creatures developed mouths and mobility. In Scotland, he reveals that one of the smallest fossils found holds the secret to how animals began surviving on dry land, and explains the bloom of life during the oxygen-rich Carboniferous period

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: In the first of a two-part documentary, the naturalist explores the origins of life on Earth. Beginning the journey near his childhood home in Charnwood Forest, Leicestershire, he learns how a fossil discovery transformed scientists understanding of the evolution of complex organisms, and in Newfoundland and Australia he reveals the earliest kinds of animal to exist on the planet. With the help of cutting-edge technology and visual effects, the programme brings the creatures to life, demonstrating how they survived

programme.title: David Attenboroughs First Life
programme.desc: In the conclusion of the two-part documentary, the naturalist travels to Burgess Shale in Canadas Rocky Mountains, where he explores how evolution gained pace once creatures developed mouths and mobility. In Scotland, he reveals that one of the smallest fossils found holds the secret to how animals began surviving on dry land, and explains the bloom of life during the oxygen-rich Carboniferous period

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: A further selection of creepy-crawly close-ups, focusing on courtship in the bug world. Highlights include scorpions shaking their booty, the perfume-wearing nasonia wasp and the tropical cricket, for whom romance goes out of the window as it uses bribery to seal the deal with would-be partners. One potential partner to steer well clear of, however, is the praying mantis, the female of which is notorious for eating the male just after - or even during - mating. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Pride Rules
programme.desc: The challenges that lions face during the rainy season, when everything turns green and spoils the big cats camouflage

programme.title: Predators
programme.desc: Tom Hardy presents a journey to the harsh Okavango Delta as the Matata pride do battle with wildfires and flooding in a high-stakes fight to keep their cubs alive

programme.title: Wild Latin America
programme.desc: A newborn whale draws its first breath and then preparation begins for one of the longest migrations on the planet

programme.title: Wild Latin America
programme.desc: Tensions rise as breeding season nears for the squirrel monkeys. With enemies closing in, dominant female Alba must find her alpha male suitor

programme.title: Beasts of the Big Blue
programme.desc: Exploring New Zealands marine wildlife, beginning with Snares Island in the southern Pacific and its crested penguins, petrels and sea lions

programme.title: Pride Rules
programme.desc: The challenges that lions face during the rainy season, when everything turns green and spoils the big cats camouflage

programme.title: Predators
programme.desc: Tom Hardy presents a journey to the harsh Okavango Delta as the Matata pride do battle with wildfires and flooding in a high-stakes fight to keep their cubs alive

programme.title: Boss Shark
programme.desc: Specialists study a school of great whites in the waters off New Zealands Stewart Island in the hope of finding an elusive and intimidating alpha shark

programme.title: Lifes Journey
programme.desc: Documentary revealing how Africas creatures overcome danger when they are at their most vulnerable. For the first few weeks of life, the world is a frightening place. Danger lurks around every corner and animals cannot afford to let their guard down

programme.title: Lifes Journey
programme.desc: The obstacles young animals have to overcome on their way to adulthood, when their chances of survival increase hugely

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: Raising the next generation is the number one priority for every animal species. For some creatures, an entire village lends a helping hand, but others prefer to go solo

programme.title: Animal Empires
programme.desc: The threat of extinction is all too real in the wild, but even against terrible odds, many animals fight back from the brink to continue their empires

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: The powers of fire and ice collide in Iceland, actually Earths largest volcanic island. Take a journey to this country driven by the forces of nature

programme.title: Undiscovered Vistas
programme.desc: A return to Iceland to see how its landscapes are changing through the retreat of its glaciers. Every year, their tremendous power alters the nation for ever

programme.title: Were the Millers (2013)
programme.desc: A drug dealer is hired to pick up a shipment of marijuana in Mexico and bring it back over the border. To make himself look less suspicious, he recruits a stripper and two teenagers to pose as a perfect all-American family on holiday, only to end up getting on the wrong side of a drug cartel. Comedy, with Jason Sudeikis, Jennifer Aniston and Emma Roberts

programme.title: Finding Your Feet (2017)
programme.desc: A wealthy womans privileged existence is shattered when she discovers her husband is having an affair with her best friend. Seeking solace, she turns to her estranged sister, who lives in a London council estate, and finds a new lease of life in joining her community dance class. Comedy, starring Imelda Staunton, Celia Imrie, Timothy Spall and Joanna Lumley

programme.title: Ride On (2023)
programme.desc: Lao Luo is a washed-up stuntman with a deformed horse called Red Hare, who he saved from euthanasia. The duo become overnight sensations when a fight with debt collectors goes viral. Writer/director Larry Yangs action drama, starring Jackie Chan, Liu Haocun and Kevin Guo. In Mandarin, with subtitles

programme.title: Superbad (2007)
programme.desc: Two teenage friends are on the brink of going to different colleges, so decide to mark the event by going to a party where they hope to lose their virginity. However, they have promised to supply the booze for the event, a task that proves much harder than expected because they are under age. Unfortunately, when a friend steps in to help, the situation gets even worse. Comedy, starring Jonah Hill, Michael Cera and Christopher Mintz-Plasse

programme.title: So I Married an Axe Murderer (1993)
programme.desc: A poet has a history of ruining relationships owing to his paranoia, but when he meets the woman of his dreams, he resolves to make this romance last. However, as their wedding day approaches, he becomes convinced she is a notorious serial killer the police are hunting for. Comedy, starring Mike Myers and Nancy Travis

programme.title: Mean Girls (2004)
programme.desc: A teenager is surprised when she is befriended by the girls in the most popular clique at her new school. However, a dating mishap leads to trouble and her supposed friends start to turn on her. Urged on by other pals outside their circle, the newcomer resolves to bring down the self-appointed queen of campus - only to end up adopting some of her rivals crueller characteristics. Comedy, with Lindsay Lohan, Rachel McAdams, Tina Fey and Lacey Chabert

programme.title: Role Models (2008)
programme.desc: Two irresponsible salesmen find themselves in trouble with the law after crashing their truck. To avoid jail, they agree to undertake community service looking after a couple of troubled kids. However, it soon seems that going to prison would have been the easier option. Comedy, starring Paul Rudd, Seann William Scott and Christopher Mintz-Plasse

programme.title: The 40 Year-Old Virgin (2005)
programme.desc: A middle-aged shop worker reveals he has never been intimate with a woman, which prompts his shocked colleagues to set him up with a series of potentially passionate dates. When he falls for a single mother, his friends think he is right on course for a lusty liaison, but his new partner is not ready for a physical relationship. Judd Apatows comedy, starring Steve Carell, Catherine Keener and Paul Rudd

programme.title: Little Fockers (2010)
programme.desc: Nurse Greg is now the proud father of twins, but has yet to earn the respect of his wifes stern father after 10 years of marriage. The couple invite both sides of their extended family to the kids birthday party, where Greg makes a desperate effort to finally prove his worth to his father-in-law. Comedy sequel, with Ben Stiller, Robert De Niro, Owen Wilson and Dustin Hoffman

programme.title: The Hangover (2009)
programme.desc: Three men on a stag weekend in Las Vegas wake up after a night of heavy drinking and find they have not only misplaced the groom, but somehow gained a tiger and a baby. Unable to remember the details of the night before, they set about piecing the clues together in the hope of finding their missing friend. Comedy, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: The Hangover Part II (2011)
programme.desc: Phil, Stu and Alan reunite in Bangkok for another stag weekend, but having learned the lessons of their previous misadventures, resolve to keep this one quiet and alcohol-free. Things inevitably do not go according to plan, and they must once again piece together the events of a wild night they cannot remember. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms and Zach Galifianakis

programme.title: The Hangover Part III (2013)
programme.desc: Drinking buddies Phil and Stu try to help their troubled friend Alan get his life in order, only to stumble into another bizarre misadventure. The Mob have taken Alans brother hostage and to free him, they have to track down manic gangster Mr Chow, who has escaped from a Thai prison. Comedy sequel, starring Bradley Cooper, Ed Helms, Zach Galifianakis and John Goodman

programme.title: Little Fockers (2010)
programme.desc: Nurse Greg is now the proud father of twins, but has yet to earn the respect of his wifes stern father after 10 years of marriage. The couple invite both sides of their extended family to the kids birthday party, where Greg makes a desperate effort to finally prove his worth to his father-in-law. Comedy sequel, with Ben Stiller, Robert De Niro, Owen Wilson and Dustin Hoffman

programme.title: Jackass 3 (2010)
programme.desc: Third movie based on the MTV comedy series, in which Johnny Knoxville, Bam Margera, Ryan Dunn and the rest of the fearless team of pranksters embark on even more strange and disturbing stunts, which range from gluing themselves together, enraging dangerous animals and firing an occupied portable toilet from a catapult

programme.title: Stuart Little (1999)
programme.desc: An American couple decide their son needs a brother, and plan to adopt another child - but when they get to the orphanage they are greeted by a charming talking mouse named Stuart, who fits the bill perfectly. However, their jealous cat hatches a plot to get rid of the new arrival. Comedy adventure, starring Geena Davis and Hugh Laurie, with the voice of Michael J Fox

programme.title: The Natural
programme.desc: A baseball prodigys dreams of sporting stardom are cut short when he gets shot. Once he has recovered from his injuries, he rejoins his team as a rookie recruit at an age when most players are thinking of retiring - only to enjoy an unexpected run of success. Drama, starring Robert Redford, Glenn Close, Kim Basinger, Robert Duvall and Barbara Hershey

programme.title: Bye Bye Birdie (1963)
programme.desc: A songwriter tries to organise a farewell performance for a popular rock n roll singer who is about to be drafted into the US army. The event takes place in a small town, where the writer has to contend with a gaggle of screaming fans and his own domineering mother. Musical, starring Dick Van Dyke, Jesse Pearson, Janet Leigh and Ann-Margret

programme.title: Dumb and Dumber (1994)
programme.desc: Dimwitted Rhode Island limousine driver Lloyd Christmas and his equally vacuous friend Harry Dunne embark on a disaster-fraught cross-country trip to Aspen, where they hope to reunite a briefcase with its female owner. However, the pair are unaware the case contains a $1million ransom they would have been better leaving well alone. Farrelly brothers comedy, starring Jim Carrey, Jeff Daniels, Lauren Holly, Teri Garr and Mike Starr

programme.title: Dumb and Dumberer: When Harry Met Lloyd (2003)
programme.desc: The half-witted duo meet for the first time as teenagers and band together to face the perils of high school - and prove they are intelligent enough to leave remedial classes behind. Comedy prequel, starring Eric Christian Olsen, Derek Richardson, Rachel Nichols, Eugene Levy and Mimi Rogers

programme.title: Blades of Glory (2007)
programme.desc: A bad-boy figure skater and his effeminate arch-enemy are banned from the sport after their intense rivalry results in a brawl. However, the pair find a loophole in the regulations allowing them to enter the world championships as the first ever same-sex pair - if they can put aside their differences long enough to compete. Comedy, starring Will Ferrell, Jon Heder, Will Arnett and Amy Poehler

programme.title: The Hangover (2009)

programme.title: The Naked Gun (2025)
programme.desc: Following in the footsteps of his legendary father, Frank Drebin Jr must save his police department by solving a case. Comedy reboot, starring Liam Neeson, Pamela Anderson and Danny Huston

programme.title: The Naked Gun: From the Files of Police Squad! (1988)
programme.desc: While investigating the shooting of a colleague, disaster-prone police lieutenant Frank Drebin uncovers a plot to assassinate the Queen during her visit to Los Angeles. However, after he is sacked from the force by the mayor, the cop has to operate beneath the radar to get to the bottom of the conspiracy. Comedy, with Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley and Ricardo Montalban

programme.title: The Naked Gun 2 1/2: The Smell of Fear (1991)
programme.desc: Blundering cop Frank Drebin discovers a secret conspiracy to kidnap a renowned solar energy expert and replace him with an imposter. As he sets out to bring the perpetrators to justice, he is unexpectedly reunited with an old flame. Slapstick comedy sequel, starring Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley, George Kennedy, Richard Griffiths and OJ Simpson.

programme.title: Naked Gun 33 1/3: The Final Insult (1994)
programme.desc: Inept police detective Frank Drebin plans to retire from the force, but is lured back by the opportunity to foil a terrorist plot. Going undercover in prison, he sets out to prevent an evil mastermind from escaping and carrying out his fiendish plan - to bomb the Oscar awards ceremony. Comedy sequel, starring Leslie Nielsen, Priscilla Presley, OJ Simpson, George Kennedy and Fred Ward

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective (1994)
programme.desc: An eccentric but brilliant former cop sets himself up to champion the underdog - as a private eye specialising in locating missing animals. The zany detective is called in to find a kidnapped dolphin - the mascot of an American football team - and uncovers a plot involving high-level police corruption. Comedy, starring Jim Carrey, Courteney Cox, Sean Young, Tone Loc and Noble Willingham

programme.title: Hope Springs (2012)
programme.desc: A middle-aged married woman feels her long-standing relationship with her unadventurous husband is becoming stale. When she hears of a marriage counsellor offering therapy sessions in his remote retreat, she persuades her reluctant spouse to join her for a week with the doctor rediscovering why they fell in love in the first place. Romantic comedy, with Meryl Streep, Tommy Lee Jones and Steve Carell

programme.title: The Estate (2022)
programme.desc: Two sisters attempt to win over their terminally ill, difficult-to-please aunt in the hope of becoming the beneficiaries of her wealthy estate, only to find the rest of their greedy family members have the same idea. Comedy, starring Toni Collette, Anna Faris, David Duchovny and Kathleen Turner

programme.desc: Pete and Myka head to Lakefield, Illinois, to investigate the disappearance of a walking stick that gives its owner the power to create miniature earthquakes. Sci-fi drama, starring Eddie McClintock and Joanne Kelly

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Part one of two. The Enterprise encounters sadistic Borg who have rediscovered their individuality - and as a result of the run-in, Data develops the ability to experience rage. Starring Brent Spiner and Patrick Stewart, with a guest appearance by Professor Stephen Hawking

programme.desc: Part two of two. Datas malevolent brother Lore persuades him to join forces with the Borg, and he responds by taking Picard hostage - leaving Dr Crusher in charge of a skeleton crew aboard the Enterprise. Patrick Stewart and Brent Spiner star

programme.desc: Alien ambassadors visit the Enterprise on a cultural exchange, causing Worf to lose his temper. Whats more, Picard is forced to make an unscheduled landing on a mysterious planet, where he is drawn into the arms of a love-starved woman. Patrick Stewart and Michael Dorn star

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Geordi experiments with a machine that allows him to control a probe through brain-power alone - then learns the technology could help save his mother, and disobeys Picards orders in an attempt to rescue her

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Tuvok suffers from a mystery illness that causes him to experience memory flashbacks to a time when he served on a starship under the command of the famous Captain Sulu. Original Star Trek actor George Takei stars

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Kim and Paris are imprisoned on an alien planet after being falsely accused of committing terrorist acts. Sci-fi drama, starring Robert Duncan McNeill and Garrett Wang

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A discovery by the Doctor leaves the crew facing the prospect of crossing a sector of space controlled by a much-feared race. Sci-fi action, starring Kate Mulgrew and Robert Picardo

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The crew picks up two Ferengi marooned in the Delta Quadrant close to an unstable wormhole. Sci-fi drama, starring Kate Mulgrew

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: BElanna experiences strange visions involving forbidden love and betrayal during a visit by a delegation of aliens that communicates telepathically. Sci-fi adventure, starring Roxann Dawson

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: County sheriff Rick Grimes wakes from a coma in an Atlanta hospital to find the world has been ravaged by an epidemic of zombies. He sets off on a journey to find his missing family, and meets two people who teach him the new rules for survival. Post-apocalyptic drama based on a comic book series, written and directed by Frank Darabont and starring Andrew Lincoln

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick is led to another band of survivors in a department store - but the sound of gunfire puts an undead horde on his trail, and an argument between two of his new comrades jeopardises the entire groups survival. Meanwhile, Lori grows closer to Shane - unaware that her husband is still alive. Post-apocalyptic thriller, starring Andrew Lincoln

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick embarks on a perilous rescue mission, returning to zombie-ridden Atlanta to retrieve a bag of guns and save a mans life. Meanwhile, Lori struggles to deal with the unexpected return of her husband, especially in light of her blossoming romance with his best friend and old colleague Shane. Post-apocalyptic drama, starring Andrew Lincoln

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: Dustin and Lauren are captured by a drug dealer in the forest, who is subsequently murdered in a mysterious fashion. A length of hair is found at the scene of the crime, which connects the killing to a girl who went missing nine years earlier. However, while Nick visits Monroe to discuss the case, the frustrated brothers of the deceased man kidnap Dustin in a bid to determine who killed their brother

programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: When a college student is brutally murdered, Portland homicide detective Nick Burkhardt learns he is descended from hunters tasked with protecting humanity from creatures thought to only exist in fairytales. First episode of the fantasy crime drama, starring David Giuntoli

programme.title: Grimm

programme.desc: Nick and Hank investigate the case of a female lawyer found dead on a bus, having been forcibly injected with a fatal overdose of bee venom causing an anaphylactic shock. programme.title: Grimm
programme.desc: A woman is struck by a car while suffering terrifying hallucinations. Nick and Hank investigate, and discover a goat-like creature that could be behind a series of recent disappearances

programme.title: Grimm
